prompts.title: Christmas Raccoons · Sneaky Theft Frame
prompts.prompt:
A printable Christmas photo frame illustration designed exclusively as a standalone frame, in a vertical 1:1.4 aspect ratio, suitable for high-quality print.

The illustration focuses only on the frame itself, with no external environment or background scene. The style is humorous animated storybook illustration with clean outlines and soft textures.

At the exact center of the frame, reserve a blank photo placeholder area that is horizontally and vertically centered, with a 1:1.4 portrait aspect ratio and 70% of the total frame width, completely empty and untouched.

The surrounding frame border features mischievous cartoon raccoons stealing ornaments, hiding candy canes, peeking from corners, and dangling upside down from garlands, creating a playful chaotic holiday vibe.

Flat composition, print-friendly colors, no text.

prompts.title: Clumsy Penguins Children's Book Animation Photo Frame
prompts.prompt:
A vertical 1:1.4 printable Christmas photo frame illustrated in a charming, humorous children’s book animation style.

The design focuses entirely on the frame itself, with flat illustration and no background environment.

A large blank photo placeholder is reserved at the exact horizontal and vertical center, with a 1:1.4 portrait ratio and 70% of the frame width, intentionally empty and clearly separated from all decorations.

The surrounding border features clumsy cartoon penguins slipping, stacking ornaments, holding oversized stars, and interacting playfully with festive elements around the edges.

The overall style is joyful, funny, animated, and print-friendly, with no text or lettering.

prompts.title: Funny Gingerbread Animated Illustration Photo Frame
prompts.prompt:
A printable Christmas photo frame illustration in a vertical 1:1.4 aspect ratio, created in a humorous animated storybook style.

The illustration shows only the frame design, without any external environment or background scenery. The colors are warm and festive with soft paper texture.

At the exact center, reserve a blank photo placeholder that is horizontally and vertically centered, maintaining a 1:1.4 aspect ratio and 70% of the total frame width, completely blank and unobstructed.

The frame border is decorated with playful gingerbread characters striking silly poses, partially broken cookies, frosting details, and candy decorations, all drawn with expressive cartoon faces.

The mood is humorous, cozy, and whimsical, fully optimized for printing, with no typography.

prompts.title: Lazy Sloth Style Animated Christmas Photo Frame
prompts.prompt:
A printable Christmas photo frame illustration designed exclusively as a standalone frame, in a vertical 1:1.4 aspect ratio, suitable for high-quality print.

The illustration focuses only on the frame itself, with no external environment or background scene. The style is a humorous animated storybook illustration with soft textures, clean outlines, and warm colors.

At the exact center of the frame, reserve a blank photo placeholder area that is horizontally and vertically centered. The placeholder has a 1:1.4 portrait aspect ratio, with its width equal to 70% of the total frame width, and must remain completely empty and untouched.

The surrounding frame border features playful cartoon sloths hanging from candy canes, evergreen branches, and festive hooks. The sloths wear cozy knitted sweaters and scarves, striking relaxed, funny poses.

The illustration feels lighthearted, cozy, and humorous, with flat composition and print-friendly colors, no text or typography.

prompts.title: Playful Polar Bear Cartoon Christmas Photo Frame
prompts.prompt:
A printable animated Christmas photo frame in a vertical 1:1.4 aspect ratio, designed solely as a frame illustration for print.

The frame is illustrated in a humorous cartoon style with rounded shapes, expressive characters, and soft shading. No environment, no background scene, only the frame design.

A blank photo placeholder is reserved at the exact horizontal and vertical center, with a 1:1.4 aspect ratio and 70% of the frame width, completely empty and clean.

The border is decorated with playful polar bears sliding, peeking, and clinging to the edges of the frame, interacting with candy canes, ornaments, and snowballs in a silly, exaggerated way.

The overall mood is cheerful, funny, and friendly, optimized for flat printable illustration, with no text.

prompts.title: Mischievous Cats Christmas Sticker Style Photo Frame
prompts.prompt:
A vertical 1:1.4 printable Christmas photo frame illustrated in a cute, humorous animated sticker style.

The design focuses only on the frame itself, with no room, wall, or environmental context. The illustration uses bold outlines, soft colors, and expressive cartoon characters.

In the exact center, a blank photo placeholder area is horizontally and vertically centered, with a 1:1.4 portrait ratio and 70% width of the frame, completely empty and clearly defined.

The surrounding border features mischievous cartoon cats tangled in Christmas lights, knocking over ornaments, climbing garlands, and peeking from the corners, creating a playful and chaotic holiday feel.

The composition remains flat, balanced, and print-ready, with no text elements.

prompts.title: Koala Clinging to Christmas Tree
prompts.prompt: A cute printable Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A grey koala bear is clinging tightly to the trunk of a small, decorated Christmas tree instead of a eucalyptus tree, looking content and sleepy. The tree is covered in shiny silver tinsel and colorful baubles. The koala wears a tiny red bow tie. Solid pastel green background. Soft, crayon drawing texture.

prompts.title: Bear Baker with Living Gingerbread Men
prompts.prompt: A charming illustration of a brown bear baker, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The friendly bear wears a floral apron and a chef's hat, covered in white flour dust. It is happily rolling out dough on a wooden table, surrounded by gingerbread men cookies that have come to life and are running around the kitchen counter laughing. Warm, storybook art style.

prompts.title: Dormouse Asleep in Teacup
prompts.prompt: A cozy miniature Christmas illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A tiny dormouse is curled up asleep inside a ceramic teacup that is decorated with a festive red and green holly pattern. The mouse is covered by a small green leaf blanket. The teacup sits on a saucer next to a miniature mince pie on a wooden table surface. Watercolor and colored pencil style.

prompts.title: Octopus Decorating Coral Christmas Tree
prompts.prompt: A whimsical underwater Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A friendly purple octopus is using all eight arms to decorate a large piece of branching coral that looks like a Christmas tree. It's hanging shiny seashells, starfish, and strings of pearls on the branches. A Santa hat floats just above its head. Bubbles rise against a deep blue ocean background. Cute cartoon style.

prompts.title: Magical Snowy Owl Delivering Mail
prompts.prompt: A magical Christmas illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A fluffy white snowy owl with bright yellow eyes is in mid-flight against a dark blue, star-filled night sky. It carries a small, elegant red envelope sealed with a gold wax seal in its beak. A tiny sprig of holly is tucked behind its ear like a feather. The style is detailed and enchanting.

prompts.title: Sneaky Raccoons Stealing Santa's Treats
prompts.prompt: A funny Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A scene at night by a fireplace. Two sneaky raccoons wearing their natural "bandit mask" markings and tiny Santa hats are caught in the act. One is lifting a glass of milk, and the other has a chocolate chip cookie in its mouth, taken from a plate labeled 'For Santa'. Only their eyes are illuminated by the firelight. Cute, mischievous illustration style.

prompts.title: Penguin Skiing with Candy Canes
prompts.prompt: A whimsical action illustration for a Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A cheerful penguin wearing vintage pilot goggles and a flying red scarf is skiing down a snowy slope. Instead of skis, it is using two large peppermint candy canes. Snow sprays out behind it dynamically. In the background, there are simple cartoon pine trees. Fun, dynamic cartoon style with bold outlines.

prompts.title: Sleeping Polar Bears
prompts.prompt: A heartwarming printable Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A large mother polar bear is lying down fast asleep, curled up in a snowy drift. A tiny polar bear cub is sleeping soundly on her broad back, wearing a miniature red and green striped nightcap. A gentle snowfall surrounds them against a soft light blue background. The style is a tender children's book illustration with soft colors.

prompts.title: Tuxedo Cat Tangled in Ribbon
prompts.prompt: A funny printable Christmas card illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A mischievous black and white tuxedo cat is comically tangled in a massive explosion of red satin gift ribbon and torn festive wrapping paper on a clean white background. Only its wide, surprised green eyes and one paw are visible from the center of the shiny red chaos. A roll of tape is stuck to its tail. Dynamic cartoon sketch style.

prompts.title: Singing Birds on Holly Branch
prompts.prompt: A cute and detailed printable Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. Five tiny, plump garden birds (a robin, a blue tit, a sparrow, a goldfinch, a wren) are perched in a row on a snow-covered holly branch with red berries. Each bird wears a different miniature knitted winter hat (bobble hat, beanie, earflap hat) and they all have their beaks open as if singing. The style is a delicate watercolor and ink drawing on textured paper.

prompts.title: Squirrel with Wrapped Acorn
prompts.prompt: A whimsical printable Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A busy red squirrel with fluffy ear tufts stands on a snow-covered tree branch against a pale winter sky. It is holding a single acorn that is meticulously wrapped in tiny red paper with a gold bow, presenting it forward. Behind it, a pile of similarly wrapped acorns is stacked inside a hollow log. The squirrel wears a tiny green knit scarf. Colored pencil texture style.

prompts.title: Corgi Stuck in Chimney
prompts.prompt: A humorous Christmas card illustration, flat graphic style, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A red brick chimney stack stands against a dark blue night sky with stars. Stuck upside down in the top opening of the chimney is the fluffy orange and white butt of a Corgi dog, with its short back legs wiggling in the air. A tiny Santa hat is falling off one foot. Smoke puffs out around it in the shape of question marks.

prompts.title: Fluffy Highland Cow with Christmas Lights
prompts.prompt: A charming and fuzzy Christmas illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A close-up portrait of a super fluffy ginger Scottish Highland cow. Its shaggy hair completely covers its eyes, but colorful tangled Christmas lights that are glowing, and small shiny red baubles, are caught in its bangs and long horns. Light snowflakes dust its fur. The background is a soft, blurred snowy pasture. Painterly, textured style.

prompts.title: Long Dachshund Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A funny flat vector illustration for a Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A very long brown dachshund dog stretches horizontally across the entire card against a solid pale blue background. It is wearing an absurdly long, red knitted turtleneck sweater with a repeating pattern of white reindeer and snowflakes. The sweater is so long it sags in the middle, touching the ground. The dog looks content. Text below reads: "Longing for Christmas."

prompts.title: Whimsical Hedgehog Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A whimsical printable Christmas card illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A small, round hedgehog is curled up into a ball on a clean cream background. Its spines are hilariously covered with tiny, colorful Christmas baubles, miniature candy canes, and bits of shiny tinsel that have gotten stuck to them. The hedgehog has a slightly confused but happy expression, with one eye peeking out. The style is a gentle watercolor painting with soft textures.

prompts.title: Kawaii Otters with Candy Cane
prompts.prompt: An adorable printable Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. Two cute furry sea otters are floating on their backs in icy blue water, holding paws. Instead of their usual rock, they are jointly holding a large red and white striped peppermint candy cane across their chests. Both wear tiny Santa hats titled on their heads. Soft white ripples surround them. The style is a kawaii cartoon with soft shading.

prompts.title: Santa's Laundry Line Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A whimsical and domestic Christmas scene, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A clothesline made of festive tinsel is strung across a pale blue snowy sky background. Pinned to the line with wooden clothespins are Santa's iconic clothes: his big red jacket with white fur trim, his red trousers, a pair of red suspenders, and a pair of humorous white boxer shorts covered in a pattern of green holly leaves and red berries. A small bluebird is perched on the clothesline. The style is a clean, flat illustration with a paper-cut texture effect. A unique and funny take on Santa getting ready.

prompts.title: Pug Disguised as Elf Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A funny, flat vector illustration for a Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The image shows a horizontal lineup of four Santa's elves dressed in green tunics, red and white striped tights, and pointy hats. In the middle of the line, trying to blend in, is a beige Pug dog standing on its hind legs, wearing the exact same elf costume. The elves on either side are looking at the dog with side-eye suspicion, while the dog looks straight ahead with a blank, innocent expression. The background is a solid festive red. Text at the bottom reads: {argument name="text" default="Day 24: They still suspect nothing."} in a typewriter font.

prompts.title: Reindeer Flight School Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A charming and funny Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The scene depicts a "Reindeer Flight School." A cute, clumsy baby reindeer with a slightly oversized red nose is hovering just a few inches off the snowy ground, legs splayed out in all directions, looking panicked but determined. He is wearing vintage aviator goggles and a brown leather helmet. Behind him, a tiny red robin bird is using its beak to push the reindeer's bottom to help him stay up. The background is a simple, pale blue winter sky with fluffy white clouds. The style is a detailed colored pencil drawing on textured paper.

prompts.title: Marshmallow Hot Tub Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A kawaii style printable Christmas card illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The view is a top-down perspective looking into a red ceramic mug filled with rich, brown hot chocolate. Inside the mug, three adorable white marshmallow characters are relaxing as if it's a hot tub. One marshmallow is leaning back with drawn-on sunglasses made of chocolate icing. Another is wearing a tiny candy cane snorkel. The third is floating on a square of chocolate bar like a raft. Steam swirls rise up in the shape of hearts. The background outside the mug is a soft pink with white polka dots. High resolution, bright colors, vector art style.

prompts.title: Hamster with Cranberry Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: An exquisite, printable Christmas greeting card illustration in a soft, storybook watercolor style, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The scene is a close-up macro view of a chubby, golden-brown hamster wearing a tiny, knitted red Santa hat. The hamster sits at a miniature wooden table made from a popsicle stick. He is holding a single, bright red cranberry with both paws, looking absolutely delighted with stuffed cheeks. On the table, there is a thimble serving as a cup and a tiny plate with a crumb of cheese. The background is a warm, creamy off-white paper texture with faint watercolor holly leaves in the corners. The mood is cozy, tiny, and heartwarming.

prompts.title: Cat in Christmas Lights Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A humorous and cute printable card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The illustration features a chaotic, tangled mess of colorful vintage Christmas lights (red, green, blue, yellow bulbs) forming a rough ball shape in the center of a solid white background. Emerging from the center of the tangle is a cute black cat with wide, yellow eyes and a mischievous expression. The cat has one paw stuck out, batting at a loose bulb. A "To/From" gift tag is tangled in the wire, dangling from the cat's ear. The style is a flat graphic illustration with clean lines and vibrant colors. Text at the bottom: {argument name="text" default="I Helped."} in a messy, scratchy black font.

prompts.title: Watercolor Snowy Cabin Landscape
prompts.prompt: A serene watercolor landscape, --ar 10:14. A lonely cabin in a vast snowy field at sunset. The sky is a gradient of {argument name="sky color 1" default="purple"}, {argument name="sky color 2" default="pink"}, and {argument name="sky color 3" default="orange"}. Smoke rises vertically from the chimney. Soft, wet-on-wet watercolor technique.

prompts.title: Luxury Navy Snowflake Mandala Card
prompts.prompt: An exquisite luxury card design, --ar 10:14. A deep {argument name="background color" default="navy blue"} velvet texture background. In the center, a large, intricate snowflake mandala is rendered in embossed {argument name="foil color" default="gold"} foil. The {argument name="foil color" default="gold"} looks shiny and metallic.

prompts.title: Vintage Travel Poster Winter Scene
prompts.prompt: A vintage travel poster style Christmas card. A stylized view of a snowy mountain lodge with a skier. Bold flat colors, screen print texture. Text at bottom: "{argument name="message" default="Winter Wonderland"}". --ar 10:14

prompts.title: Nostalgic Toy Shop Window Scene
prompts.prompt: A nostalgic illustration of a toy shop window at night. Inside, a toy train circles a tree, and tin soldiers stand guard. The window frame is wood, and snow gathers in the corners. Warm yellow glow from inside.

prompts.title: Mid-Century Modern Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A retro geometric design, --ar 10:14. Mid-century modern atomic starbursts and diamond shapes in {argument name="color 1" default="gold"}, {argument name="color 2" default="turquoise"}, and {argument name="color 3" default="orange"} on a {argument name="background color" default="cream"} background. "{argument name="greeting" default="Merry Christmas"}" in a retro 50s font.

prompts.title: Victorian Father Christmas Postcard
prompts.prompt: A vintage Victorian Christmas postcard style illustration, --ar 10:14. A classic Father Christmas in a long {argument name="robe color" default="green"} robe with {argument name="trim color" default="gold"} trim walks through a snowy village carrying a lantern. Muted colors, aged paper texture, detailed cross-hatching.

prompts.title: Sleepy Animals Stack Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A cute cartoon illustration. A stack of three sleepy animals: a {argument name="bottom animal" default="bear"} at the bottom, a {argument name="middle animal" default="fox"} in the middle, and a {argument name="top animal" default="bunny"} on top, all hibernating together under a patchwork quilt. "{argument name="message" default="Cozy & Bright"}" text in the clouds above. --ar 10:14

prompts.title: Penguin Christmas Lights Struggle Card
prompts.prompt: A cute and funny printable Christmas card, --ar 10:14. A cartoon penguin is struggling to untangle a massive ball of colorful Christmas lights. The penguin looks frustrated but adorable. White background with soft blue snow shadows. Text: "{argument name="message" default="It's that time again..."}"

prompts.title: Modern Typography Christmas Tree Card
prompts.prompt: A modern, flat graphic Christmas card, --ar 10:14. On a solid {argument name="background color" default="matcha green"} background, a geometric Christmas tree is formed entirely by white typography of varying weights and sizes, spelling out holiday words like "{argument name="word 1" default="Joy"}", "{argument name="word 2" default="Love"}", "{argument name="word 3" default="Noel"}", "{argument name="word 4" default="Snow"}". The overall shape is a clean triangle. Minimalist and bold.

prompts.title: Kawaii Hot Cocoa Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A kawaii style Christmas card. A happy, smiling cup of hot cocoa with marshmallows bathing in it. The marshmallows have tiny faces. Steam rises in the shape of a heart. Pastel pink background with white polka dots. Text: "{argument name="message" default="Sending you a hug in a mug."}" --ar 10:14

prompts.title: Snowman and Birds on Park Bench
prompts.prompt:
A beautiful and charming winter illustration, perfect for a printable greeting card. A friendly snowman with a carrot nose, coal eyes, and a smile sits on a weathered green wooden park bench partially covered in soft snow. The snowman is dressed in a dark brown fedora and a warm red and yellow patterned scarf, with twig arms resting on the bench.

A vibrant red cardinal is perched on the back of the bench. Next to the snowman sits a small burlap sack overflowing with birdseed. Several cute black-capped chickadees are happily eating seeds on the bench and on the snowy ground in the foreground.

The background shows a serene, snowy landscape with a forest of pine trees under a pale, overcast sky with large, soft snowflakes gently falling. The entire scene has a soft, painterly texture with a gentle, embossed quality, creating a heartwarming and peaceful mood.

High detail, intricate, beautiful illustration, printable quality. --ar 1:1.4

prompts.title: Navy Blue Silver Filigree Card
prompts.prompt:
A beautiful, printable Christmas greeting card design, flat vector art style, with a 1:1.4 aspect ratio. The background is a solid, deep navy blue.

In the center, the words {argument name="greeting" default="Merry Christmas"} are written in an elegant, flowing white script font.

The text is surrounded by delicate, symmetrical filigree swirls and flourishes in light blue and silvery-gray. These decorative vines are adorned with stylized silver-gray leaves and small dots like winter berries or snow, also in light blue and silver. A simple, thin horizontal stripe in a lighter blue runs along the bottom edge.

The overall design is clean, minimalist, and sophisticated with a cool winter color palette. High resolution, sharp lines, elegant graphic illustration.

prompts.title: Charcoal Folk Art Botanical Card
prompts.prompt:
An exquisite, printable Christmas card design, presented in a frontal view.
The background is a solid dark charcoal gray with a matte paper texture.

In the center, the greeting {argument name="greeting" default="Merry Christmas"} is elegantly hand-lettered in a flowing white brush script.
The text is beautifully framed by a dense, hand-painted border of festive botanicals in a charming folk art style. This border features stylized red poinsettia flowers, dark green holly leaves with red berries, pine sprigs, and clusters of golden-yellow berries.

Light teal leafy vines are woven throughout the arrangement, providing a modern and colorful contrast. Small, simple red hearts are tucked into the design, adding a touch of warmth.

The illustration has a flat, 2D gouache on paper look, with opaque colors and a delightful handcrafted feel.

Aspect ratio 1:1.4.

prompts.title: Watercolor Snowman Family Portrait
prompts.prompt:
A beautiful, printable Christmas greeting card design in a charming watercolor style.

In the center, a delightful family of three snowmen—a father snowman in a black top hat and plaid scarf, a mother snowman in a red beanie and plaid scarf, and a small child snowman in a striped red scarf—pose happily in the snow. They are surrounded by colorful wrapped gift boxes.

Behind them stands a beautifully decorated Christmas tree with red and gold baubles and a shining star on top.

The background is a clean, solid white with delicate, light grey snowflakes gently falling.

At the top, the greeting '{argument name="Greeting" default="Merry Christmas"}' is written in an elegant, flowing black script font. Below it, the text '{argument name="Sub-greeting" default="TO A SPECIAL FAMILY"}' appears in a simple, smaller capital font.

At the bottom, personalized names '{argument name="Names" default="James Ella Claire"}' are written in the same elegant black script.

The overall design is heartwarming, clean, and festive. Flat 2D illustration, front-facing view. High resolution, intricate details, perfect for printing. --ar 1:1.4

prompts.title: Personalized Snowman Family of Four
prompts.prompt:
A charming, flat design Christmas card illustration featuring a family of four smiling snowmen standing in a row on a snowy landscape. The style is clean, whimsical, and vector-like.

The background is a layered winter scene with a medium grey sky filled with small white dots for snow and elegant white swirls. Below the sky are two rolling hills in a lighter shade of grey.

The four snowmen are in the center. Each is made of two white snowballs and has black dot eyes, a carrot nose, and a happy smile. They are personalized with names and accessories:
The first snowman on the left wears a red beanie and has the name {argument name="name 1" default="MARK"} on its chest.
The second snowman wears red earmuffs and a red scarf, with the name {argument name="name 2" default="STACEY"}.
The third snowman wears a red pom-pom beanie and a red scarf, with the name {argument name="name 3" default="OLIVIA"}.
The fourth snowman on the right wears a red beanie, with the name {argument name="name 4" default="NATHAN"}.

Below the snowmen, in a clean white foreground area, the text "MERRY CHRISTMAS" is written in a classic black serif font.

The image is a high-resolution, exquisite, printable greeting card design. Frontal view, full-frame composition, with an aspect ratio of 1:1.4.

prompts.title: Rainbow Bottle Brush Trees
prompts.prompt:
A high-quality, printable Christmas card design in a minimalist flat illustration style, aspect ratio 1:1.4.

The design is set against a solid, very pale pink background.
At the top center, the text '{argument name="top text" default="MERRY CHRISTMAS"}' is written in a simple, clean, all-caps font. Directly below, the phrase '{argument name="bottom text" default="one and all"}' appears in a delicate, casual handwritten script.

The main illustration features a row of six stylized bottle brush Christmas trees in the lower half of the card. The trees are rendered with a sketchy, scribbled texture of dense horizontal lines. They are arranged in a vibrant rainbow color order from left to right: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple.

The trees vary slightly in height, creating a gentle, uneven line. Each tree has a simple trunk and a small, flat oval stand. The text and the tree stands are a matching muted taupe brown color. The overall design is clean, modern, and charming.

prompts.title: Elegant Golden Filigree Tree on Green
prompts.prompt:
An exquisite, printable Christmas greeting card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The design features a solid, deep forest green background.

Centered on the card is a beautifully stylized Christmas tree composed of intricate, swirling golden filigree and ribbons. These elegant, flowing lines and curls form the iconic triangular shape of a tree, topped with a simple loop.

The tree is lavishly decorated with small, sparkling golden stars, starbursts, and tiny dots that resemble festive lights. The golden elements have a subtle gradient giving them a shiny, metallic foil appearance.

Below the tree, the greeting '{argument name="text" default="Merry Christmas"}' is written in an elegant, flowing cursive script, matching the golden color and texture of the tree.

The overall style is modern, minimalist, and very elegant. Flat vector graphic illustration.

prompts.title: Personalized Family Stockings Watercolor
prompts.prompt:
An exquisite, printable Christmas greeting card design in a minimalist watercolor style, set against a clean, solid white background.

In the upper half of the card, a festive green pine garland hangs in a graceful arc, decorated with small red berries and soft, glowing fairy lights. A large, elegant red bow with gold trim is prominently featured at the center of the garland.

Hanging from the garland are three personalized Christmas stockings. The first stocking on the left is a {argument name="Stocking 1 Pattern" default="red tartan plaid"}, with the name {argument name="Name 1" default="Mum"} on its white cuff. The middle stocking, directly below the bow, is a {argument name="Stocking 2 Pattern" default="green tartan plaid"}, with the name {argument name="Name 2" default="Liam"} on its white cuff. The third stocking on the right is {argument name="Stocking 3 Pattern" default="red with white snowflakes"}, with the name {argument name="Name 3" default="Dad"} on its white cuff. The names are written in a simple black font.

Below the illustration, the greeting {argument name="Greeting Text" default="Merry Christmas"} is written in a beautiful, flowing red cursive script.

The overall design is a flat 2D illustration, with a balanced and centered composition. The image should be presented as a front-facing view of the card design, filling the entire frame. High resolution, perfect for printing. Aspect ratio 1:1.4.

prompts.title: Vintage Disney Characters Christmas
prompts.prompt:
An exquisite, printable Christmas greeting card featuring classic Disney characters in a vintage 2D illustration style, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The overall mood is cheerful and festive.

The scene is set against a vibrant bright green background, lightly speckled with shimmering gold glitter. In the center stands a lush Christmas tree decorated with colorful ornaments and topped with a large, shining gold glitter star.

A group of beloved Disney characters, all dressed in Santa Claus outfits with red suits and hats trimmed in white fur, are gathered around the tree. At the top left, Goofy peeks out from behind the tree, waving happily. On the upper right, Donald Duck excitedly holds a wrapped gift.

In the foreground at the bottom, Minnie Mouse stands on the left, wearing a Santa dress with a holly accent, striking a sweet, shy pose. In the center, a large red Santa's sack overflows with presents, and a joyful Pluto sits inside it, looking up at Mickey Mouse. To the right, Mickey Mouse laughs heartily, his hands on the sack.

At the very bottom of the card, there is festive text in a bold, red, sans-serif font. The first line reads {argument name="Top Text" default="CAROLS and PRESENTS"}, and the second line reads {argument name="Bottom Text" default="and TREATS by the TON!"}.

prompts.title: Victorian Die-Cut Floral Bouquet
prompts.prompt:
A beautiful, printable vintage Victorian Christmas card illustration, designed as an intricate die-cut shape. The artwork features a lush, layered bouquet of festive flowers with a classic, elegant feel.

A large, vibrant red poinsettia with delicate gold foil outlines dominates the upper part of the composition. Below it to the left rests an elegant, creamy-white poinsettia, also detailed with gold outlines and a beaded center. A rich, dark red rose with fine gold-lined petals is nestled on the right.

The arrangement is filled out with deep green holly leaves, small clusters of bright red holly berries, and sprigs of pale green mistletoe, creating a full and festive look. The overall effect is of layered, embossed papercraft with subtle shadows that give it a gentle depth.

In the bottom right, a small, decorative antique paper tag is tucked into the bouquet, displaying the text: {argument name="greeting" default="Wish you a merry Christmas"} in ornate, multi-colored calligraphy.

The entire image is a flat, front-facing view, exquisitely detailed and perfect for printing. Aspect ratio 1:1.4.

prompts.title: Cozy Watercolor Christmas Living Room
prompts.prompt:
A beautiful, printable watercolor illustration of a cozy and bright Christmas living room. The scene features a classic white fireplace on the right with a warm, roaring fire. The mantelpiece is elegantly decorated with a lush pine garland, red berries, and a festive wreath. Next to the fireplace and by a large, arched window on the left, stand small, charming Christmas trees. Soft, bright daylight streams through the window. The foreground shows a hint of a wooden chair and a soft red rug on the warm-toned floor.

The overall style is light and airy, with a soft color palette of yellows, greens, and reds, painted with delicate, expressive watercolor strokes on textured paper.

--ar 1:1.4

prompts.title: Musical Note Christmas Tree
prompts.prompt:
A beautifully designed, printable Christmas card with a minimalist and elegant aesthetic, presented in a frontal view.

The main feature is a Christmas tree creatively formed from an assortment of black musical notes and symbols. His school uniform collar is slightly loose, he props his elbow on the desk and secretly turns his head to gaze at her, his eyes filled with gentle, restrained affection and tenderness, pupils slightly dilated, his Adam's apple gently rolls. Suddenly noticing her pen pause, he quickly and flusteredly turns his head to pretend to look at his own notes, his earlobes quickly turn slightly red, his fingertips tremble slightly as he grips the pen, occasionally glancing at her from under his bangs, his breathing is slightly disordered, and his lips are tightly pressed in an effort to remain calm.

The girl whispers even quieter, biting her lip and peeking at him again, continuing to whisper, "...Liar.". Lip synchronization is natural and precise, emotional micro-tremors and breathing are synchronized, dialogue is low-energy whispering with a shy tone, natural short pauses between 200-400 milliseconds, the mouth only moves slightly when speaking, without exaggeration or robotic feel, perfect natural lip-sync and emotional authenticity.

prompts.title: Detailed mirror-selfie otaku room scene
prompts.prompt: ### Scene Mirror selfie in an otaku-style computer corner, blue color tone. ### Subject * Gender expression: female * Age: around 25 * Ethnicity: East Asian * Body type: slim, with a defined waist; natural body proportions * Skin tone: light neutral tone * Hairstyle: * Length: waist-length hair * Style: straight with slightly curled ends * Color: medium brown * Pose: * Stance: standing in a slight contrapposto pose * Right hand: holding a smartphone in front of her face (identity hidden) * Left arm: naturally hanging down alongside the torso * Torso: body leaning slightly back; waist and abdomen exposed * Clothing: * Top: light blue cropped knit cardigan, top two buttons fastened; a blue French-style bra faintly visible * Bottom: denim ultra-short shorts, with a blue satin ribbon bow on each side of the hips * Socks: blue and white horizontal striped over-the-knee socks * Accessory: a blue cute mascot phone case ### Environment * Description: bedroom computer corner seen through a wall-mounted mirror * Furnishings: * White desk * Single monitor showing a soft blue wallpaper (no readable text) * Mechanical keyboard with white keycaps on a blue desk mat * Mouse on a small blue mouse pad * PC tower on the right side with blue case lighting * Three anime figures on or near the PC tower * A poster of a pagoda on the wall * Cat-shaped desk lamp with blue accents * A transparent glass of water * A tall green leafy plant by the window (on the left side of the frame) * Color replacement: replace all originally pink elements (clothes and room decor) with blue tones (baby blue to sky blue/periwinkle blue). ### Lighting * Light source: daylight coming from a large window on the left side of the camera, through sheer curtains * Light quality: soft, diffused light * White balance (K): 5200 ### Camera * Mode: smartphone rear camera shooting via the mirror (no portrait/bokeh mode) * Equivalent focal length (mm): 26 * Distances (m): * Subject to mirror: 0.6 * Camera to mirror: 0.5 * Exposure: * Aperture (f): 1.8 * ISO: 100 * Shutter speed (s): 0.01 * Exposure compensation (EV): -0.3 * Focus: focus on the torso and shorts in the mirror image * Depth of field: natural smartphone deep depth of field; background clearly visible with no artificial blur * Composition: * Aspect ratio: 1:1 * Crop: from the top of the head to mid-thigh; include the desk, monitor, PC tower, and plant in the frame * Angle: slightly high angle from the mirror’s point of view * Composition note: keep the subject centered; to avoid wide-angle edge distortion, have her stand a bit further away and crop to a square later. ### Negative prompts * Any appearance of pink/magenta anywhere * Beauty filters/over-smoothed skin; poreless skin look * Exaggerated or distorted anatomy * NSFW, see-through fabrics, wardrobe malfunctions * Logos, brand names, or readable user interface text * Fake portrait-mode blur, CGI/illustration feel
prompts.description: A very detailed Nano Banana prompt describing a female mirror selfie in a blue-toned otaku computer corner, with full specifications for character, environment, lighting, camera, and negative prompts.

prompts.title: Premium liquid glass Bento grid product infographic with 8 modules
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: [insert product name] Language: [insert language] System Instruction: Create an image of premium liquid glass Bento grid product infographic with 8 modules (card 2 to 8 show text titles only). 1) Product Analysis: → Identify product's dominant natural color → "hero color" → Identify category: FOOD / MEDICINE / TECH 2) Color Palette (derived from hero): → Product + accents: full saturation hero color → Icons, borders: muted hero (30-40% saturation, never black) 3) Visual Style: → Hero product: real photography (authentic, premium), 3D Glass version [choose one] → Cards: Apple liquid glass (85-90% transparent) with Whisper-thin borders and Subtle drop shadow for floating depth and reflecting the background color → Background stays behind cards and high blur where cards are [choose one]: - Ethereal: product essence, light caustics, abstract glow - Macro: product texture close-up, heavily blurred - Pattern: product repeated softly at 10-15% opacity - Context: relevant environment, blurred + desaturated → Add subtle motion effect → Asymmetric Bento grid, 16:9 landscape → Hero card: 28-30% | Info modules: 70-72% 4) Module Content (8 Cards): M1 — Hero: Product displayed as real photo / 3D glass / stylized interpretation (choose one)in beautiful form + product name label M2 — Core Benefits: 4 unique benefits + hero-color icons M3 — How to Use: 4 usage methods + icons M4 — Key Metrics: 5 EXACT data points Format: [icon] [Label] [Bold Value] [Unit] FOOD: Calories: [X] kcal/100g, Carbs: [X]g (fiber [X]g, sugar [X]g), Protein: [X]g, [Key Vitamin]: [X]mg ([X]% DV), [Key Mineral]: [X]mg ([X]% DV) MEDICINE:Active: [name], Strength: [X] mg, Onset: [X] min, Duration: [X] hrs, Half-life: [X] hrs TECH:Chip: [model], Battery: [X] hrs, Weight: [X]g,[Key spec]: [value], Connectivity: [protocols] M5 — Who It's For: 4 recommended groups with green checkmark icons | 3 caution groups with amber warning icons M6 — Important Notes: 4 precautions + warning icons M7 — Quick Reference: → FOOD: Glycemic Index + dietary tags with icons → MEDICINE: Side effects + severity with icons → TECH: Compatibility + certifications with icons M8 — Did You Know: 3 facts (origin, science, global stat) + icons Output: 1 image, 16:9 landscape, ultra-premium liquid glass infographic.

prompts.title: Edo-period Ukiyo-e reinterpretation of a modern scene
prompts.prompt: A Japanese Edo-period Ukiyo-e woodblock print. The overall feeling is a surreal collaboration between masters like Hokusai and Hiroshige, reimagining modern technology through an ancient lens. **The scene:** {argument name="modern scene" default="a busy Shibuya scramble crossing"} **Edo transformation logic:** Characters wear Edo-era kimono but perform modern actions. All technology is transformed into surreal Edo equivalents: * Smartphones are glowing, illustrated paper scrolls being read intently. * Metro stations and trains are giant articulated wooden centipede carriages shuffling through crowds. * Skyscrapers are reimagined as endless, towering wooden pagodas reaching into dramatic clouds. * Robots and mecha appear as giant, armored woodblock golems. The composition uses a flattened perspective with large, bold, hand-carved ink outlines. The background features heavily stylized Ukiyo-e wave patterns and dramatic, swirling clouds, with a distant Mt. Fuji visible on the horizon. The image must look like a physical print, not a digital painting. * Texture: strong visible wood grain texture and rough paper fibers throughout the piece. * Printing imperfections: pigment bleeding is evident. Simulate hand-pressed plates with slight color misalignment for authenticity. * Color palette: strictly limited to traditional mineral pigments, with dominant use of Prussian blue, vermilion red, and muted yellow ochre. * Lighting: soft, flat, shadow-free lighting with no digital gradients. Aspect ratio is 3:4 vertical poster. Include vertical Japanese calligraphy describing the scene and a traditional red artist seal stamp in a corner.
prompts.description: A highly-structured image prompt to depict a modern-day scene reimagined as an Edo-period Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, with detailed guidance on anachronistic tech, composition, texture, and color.

Behind him in the midground, a vintage Haussmann building rises on the right with classic architectural molding and smooth but slightly textured aged matte plaster walls showing patchy warm beige-gray paint and neon reflections, while solid warm gray concrete grounds the environment. Weathered, leafless winter trees flank the left and center, and a worn black sedan and an SUV with glowing red tail lights navigate near a crosswalk with streetlights at the bottom right. Deep in the right-center background, the pristine silhouette of the Eiffel Tower is brightly illuminated against the sky. The {argument name="setting" default="serene Parisian twilight"} is infused with urban energy and a sophisticated, calm mood, dominated by a complementary palette of warm beige, sunset orange-yellow, charcoal gray, and striking accents of neon green glowing from the base of the architecture. Mixed, multiple soft light sources diffuse gently from above, providing a golden ambient fill with moderate intensity and low, flat contrast. Soft, short, and gradual gray shadows gather subtly under his chin and crossed arms, while preserved highlights catch naturally on his defined cheekbones and glossy hair. Captured as a realistic, tack-sharp digital photograph on a 35mm lens at f/2.8, 1/125s, and ISO 400, the clean, grain-free lifestyle travel aesthetic utilizes a medium depth of field and is elevated by post-processing that applies warm color grading in the highlights, lifted shadows, and enhanced neon green accents, all beautifully framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Monochromatic Coastal Riviera Portrait
prompts.prompt: A {argument name="subject" default="confident man"} sits centered facing the camera in a {argument name="clothing" default="crisp white shirt"} and dark sunglasses, exuding an effortless candid demeanor with a subtle, closed-mouth smile and relaxed eyebrows. His dark, wavy hair, cut to about three to four inches, features a tousled, unstructured volume with a natural matte finish, slight frizz, and visible flyaways. His shoulders are entirely relaxed as his weight rests symmetrically, with his left hand casually resting on a surface and his right hand organically grasping a glass tumbler in a fluid, relaxed gesture. He is layered seamlessly into a {argument name="setting" default="deep outdoor coastal setting"}, framed from above by thriving, dense leafy canopy vines in the foreground. The midground reveals a weathered, rough matte mid-gray stone masonry wall with patchy, visible mortar on the left, alongside a worn industrial fan mounted to the canopy frame on the right. He sits above a gray checkered tile floor, with the scene extending outward to a pristine background ocean marked by a perfectly flat horizon. The monochromatic atmosphere is rendered in a strict black-and-white high-contrast palette where the bright whites of the shirt and sky balance against deep black shadows and mid-gray midtones. Bright, natural light filters down from multiple sources above but strikes with a hard, directional quality, creating dramatic, harshly defined deep black shadows under the lush canopy, across his neck, and down the right side of his face, while meticulously preserving brilliant specular highlights on the shoulders of his shirt and the distant sky to evoke a sophisticated Italian Riviera summer lifestyle mood. Captured as a tack-sharp digital editorial photograph shot straight on at f/4.0, 1/500s, and ISO 100, the realistic image features a medium depth of field and distinct digital noise, refined with high-contrast curve adjustments to emphasize its organic visual style, all framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.description: A sophisticated high-contrast black and white prompt for an editorial-style portrait of a man in a coastal Italian setting.

prompts.title: Anime Film Storyboard Board
prompts.prompt: STORY Panel 1 Warm cloudy evening after light rain. A small neighborhood park glows under golden sunset light. Children are laughing and playing together. In the distance, the long-haired girl sits alone on a swing. The empty swing beside her slowly moves in the wind. Camera note: Wide establishing shot. ⸻ Panel 2 Close-up. The girl watches the other children from afar while quietly spinning her handmade paper windmill. A faint sad smile appears. Camera note: Slow push-in. ⸻ Panel 3 A sudden gust of wind lifts the paper windmill from her hands. It flies across the park. The girl stands and runs after it. Camera note: Tracking shot. ⸻ Panel 4 The windmill lands near a group of children playing. The girl hesitates and freezes. She is too shy to approach them. From her perspective the group feels intimidating and distant. Camera note: Low-angle emotional POV. ⸻ Panel 5 One of the children notices the windmill. Instead of simply returning it, the group carefully repairs a torn corner and decorates it with colorful drawings and messages. The girl watches in surprise. Camera note: Medium emotional shot. ⸻ Panel 6 The kindest child walks toward her with a warm smile and gently offers the windmill back. The group invites her to join them. Camera note: Soft close-up. ⸻ Panel 7 The girl’s eyes fill with tears. For the first time she smiles openly. She runs toward the group while clutching the repaired windmill. Camera note: Dynamic running shot with sunset backlight. ⸻ Panel 8 Final emotional wide shot. The girl and her new friends laugh together beneath glowing sunset clouds. The once-empty swing gently moves in the background. The repaired windmill spins in the warm evening breeze. Mood: {argument name="mood" default="Bittersweet, heartwarming, unforgettable"}. Camera note: Large cinematic ending frame. FINAL GOAL Create a breathtaking premium {argument name="style" default="anime film development board"} that tells a deeply emotional story about {argument name="theme" default="loneliness, kindness, and finding friendship"}. The artwork should feel like a lost masterpiece from a classic theatrical anime studio, with stunning painted backgrounds, expressive character acting, emotional visual storytelling, and a touching ending that leaves a lasting emotional impact.
prompts.description: A comprehensive prompt designed to create a premium theatrical anime film development board with multiple panels telling a story of kindness and friendship.

prompts.title: Spy Thriller Comedy Storyboard Prompt
prompts.prompt: Early morning. Total silence. A hyper-serious spy thriller vibe. A sleek black SUV idles outside a quiet suburban house. Two “tactical” men in earpieces whisper intensely. “Target is inside.” “Movement in the kitchen.” “Stand by.” Inside the house— A dad in sweatpants stands in front of the fridge, staring into it like it contains classified secrets. Cut back outside. “Subject has opened the cold storage unit.” “Thermal spike detected.” Inside, he pulls out milk. Shakes it. Sniffs it. Makes a face. Outside, one agent squints at a tablet. “He’s analyzing chemical integrity.” The front door creaks open. The dad steps onto the porch in mismatched slippers to grab the newspaper. Both agents snap alert. “Target exiting the compound.” “Visual confirmed. He looks… unstable.” The dad waves awkwardly at them. They freeze. He squints. “You guys DoorDash?” Beat. They look at each other. Inside the SUV, a third “commander” barks through the radio: “Abort. Wrong house. Again.” The agents slowly lower their sunglasses. The dad shrugs, walks back inside. Cut to kitchen. He sits at the table with his cereal. Turns on the TV. BREAKING NEWS: “International spy ring apprehended after staking out random suburban dad for third straight day.” He crunches loudly. Milk drips down his chin. He sighs. “Finally.”
prompts.description: A narrative prompt designed to generate a multi-panel storyboard for a comedic spy thriller scene involving tactical agents staking out a suburban dad who is just looking for milk in his fridge.

prompts.title: Technical Outerwear Design Sheet
prompts.prompt: An {argument name="collection name" default="AMZ Collection"} fashion design spec sheet and product layout presented as a tall, vertical infographic for men's technical outerwear. On the left side, a full-body shot features a 32-year-old male model with a short beard and a faded haircut, wearing a rugged, multi-pocketed utility jacket and matching cargo pants in deep olive green and slate grey with bright orange accents. The top of the sheet prominently displays the title "{argument name="title" default="AMZLECTION - URBAN FRONTIER SERIES"}" and "AERO SHELL PARKA SYSTEM" in a bold, clean sans-serif typeface, accompanied by a bio detailing his occupation as a systems engineer and urban explorer. The right side features a technical "Articulation & Layer Study" breakdown showing multiple back and front silhouette angles detailing the zip-in system, articulated sleeves, and hood stowage. The center section provides macro close-up macro shots highlighting the technical textures, including ripstop tech fabric, a seal-zip closure, and a grip-liner sleeve cuff. Below, a "Modular Styling" column showcases alternative ways to style the garment, such as a full protection system or a light urban shell. The bottom of the layout features grid sections labeled "Modular Add-Ons" displaying accessories like a utility belt, touchscreen-compatible tech gloves, an EDC multi-tool, and a headlamp. Adjacent to this is an "Urban Palette & Mats" swatch color bar showing slate grey, olive green, night black, blaze orange, and technical ivory, followed by a comprehensive "Technical Specifications" block outlining the fabric, insulation, closures, pockets, and features of the high-performance gear.

prompts.title: Battle-Worn Fighter Portrait
prompts.prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic close-up portrait of a battle-worn shirtless male fighter, head bowed downward in exhaustion or grim determination after a brutal fight. He has thick dark disheveled hair — soaking wet, matted, and falling forward over his bowed forehead in heavy clumps. A full thick dark beard covers his jaw and chin. His face is tilted down at roughly a 45-degree angle, showing mostly the top and side of his head, his powerful thick neck, and broad bare shoulders filling the lower frame. His skin is drenched in rain and sweat, glistening intensely. His face and neck show visible battle damage — multiple small cuts, lacerations, and blood streaks across the forehead, brow, cheek, and shoulder, skin reddened and bruised from impact. Rain falls visibly around him — individual rain streaks caught sharp against the background, hitting his skin and hair and scattering into fine mist. The background is a blurred cool grey-green misty environment — suggesting an outdoor arena, rainy battlefield, or open fight setting — with diffused white light sources creating a hazy atmospheric glow behind him. The lighting is dramatic and cinematic — a cool blue-grey ambient light wraps the scene while a subtle warmer tone catches the skin highlights on the brow ridge, nose, cheekbone, and shoulder. Color palette: deep charcoal black, cool grey-green, muted olive, warm blood-red accents, wet skin highlights. Art style: hyper-realistic dark cinematic concept art or video game cutscene quality — The Last of Us / God of War aesthetic, extreme surface detail on skin, hair, and water, volumetric rain atmosphere, 8K. Use the provided face reference image — preserve the exact facial bone structure, nose shape, jawline, beard pattern, skin tone, and overall facial identity of the reference subject. Apply the battle damage, rain, and exhaustion treatment on top while keeping the core facial identity completely recognizable.
prompts.description: A hyper-realistic cinematic prompt for a battle-hardened male fighter drenched in rain and sweat, emphasizing intense surface detail and atmospheric lighting.

prompts.title: Japanese Paper-Cut Family Diorama
prompts.prompt: This scene is a meticulously crafted, multi-layered paper-cut diorama presented within a decorative, dark-stained wooden frame, combining the stories of a young couple, their wider family, and a rich, dual-faceted Japanese environment. The main composition is divided, seamlessly transitioning between a tranquil daytime shrine with a river and distant mountains, and an enchanting nighttime scene on the left, featuring a large torii gate, a traditional stone bridge, a multi-story pagoda, and a sky filled with twinkling stars and paper-cut clouds. Framing this composite landscape are the key elements: a full branch of delicate {argument name="spring symbol" default="pink cherry blossoms"} in the upper-left, and a cascade of vibrant {argument name="autumn symbol" default="red and orange Japanese makeup leaves"} in the upper-right, symbolizing spring and autumn. At the forefront, positioned on a detailed cobblestone path that spans the bottom, is the unified family group: the young mother in her green pleated skirt and white sweater, the father holding up their small daughter, and the young son pointing enthusiastically while standing beside the grandmother in her purple qipao. At the very bottom center, on a stylized wooden plaque, the consolidated title "{argument name="title" default="A FAMILY'S JOURNEY ACROSS THE SEA"}" is clearly displayed in a refined serif font. The surrounding frame includes the ornate shoji screen details and hanging lanterns, unifying the traditional Japanese theme, all brought to life through the deep shadows and textured surfaces of intricate paper layers.
prompts.description: A complex prompt for creating a multi-layered paper-cut diorama inside a wooden frame, blending spring and autumn Japanese scenery with a family's journey.

prompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic candid smartphone photograph, 9:16 vertical. Scene Nighttime on a quiet {argument name="location" default="Tokyo city sidewalk"} beside a building with white ceramic tile walls. The subject is walking past the camera, partially side-on, captured mid-step in a rushed, accidental moment. Poses & Gestures (combined naturally) The subject reacts instinctively to being photographed: turning her head back mid-walk as if surprised, raising one hand close to the lens to partially block the camera, {argument name="expression" default="shy, restrained smile forming as she suppresses laughter"}, body angled in half-profile while continuing to walk forward, motion carries her slightly out of frame, imperfect framing. Heavy directional motion blur across the raised hand, hair, and face. Facial features appear smeared and streaked by movement, faintly recognizable but distorted. Partial ghosting around the body. Imperfect framing, subject nearly leaving the frame. Lighting Flash-only lighting fired mid-motion. Harsh flash highlights on skin and hand. Deep surrounding darkness. Uneven exposure, blown highlights, hard shadows typical of hurried night phone photography. Background White ceramic tile wall stretches into streaked light bands due to motion blur. Street surroundings fade into darkness with minimal readable detail. Mood Candid, shy, slightly playful. Feels intrusive, raw, imperfect, and authentic — like a fleeting memory accidentally captured and never meant to be perfect. Image Quality Extremely noisy. Heavily blurred. Raw smartphone look. Not cinematic. Not editorial. Not polished. Captured straight on as an organically styled, realistic digital photograph using a 50mm lens at f/2.8, the composition blends contemporary lifestyle aesthetics with industrial interior design, utilizing a medium depth of field and slightly soft overall sharpness with zero grain, finished with subtle contrast enhancements and meticulously preserved shadows, framed naturally in a 1:1 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Cyberpunk Futuristic Visor Portrait

prompts.title: Urban Rooftop Sunset Portrait
prompts.prompt: The person from the reference photo is seated on a metal rooftop railing overlooking a cityscape at {argument name="time of day" default="sunset"}, with the torso angled slightly to the right and the spine upright but relaxed. Both hands are gently holding a mug near chest height. The legs are bent at the knees, with the left foot resting on a lower metal bar and the right foot placed slightly forward on the same bar, creating a casual, balanced seated posture. The head is turned slightly to the left with the gaze directed toward the horizon, wearing a calm, contemplative expression. dark sunglasses with thin metallic frames complete the look. They are wearing a {argument name="jacket" default="charcoal-gray casual blazer"} layered over a {argument name="top" default="black crew-neck top"}, paired with slim black trousers. Black low-top sneakers with white socks complete the outfit, matching the urban rooftop setting. The environment is a hazy, warm-toned city skyline at sunset, with tall buildings fading into atmospheric haze in the background. A long avenue below is filled with lines of bokeh traffic lights, stretching toward the horizon. The sky is a muted golden color, casting soft, diffused light across the scene. The metal railing structure is weathered, adding an industrial edge to the atmosphere. Full-body portrait in portrait orientation, captured from an eye-level camera angle with a slight three-quarter perspective. The person is centered, with the city depth unfolding dramatically behind them. Depth of field keeps the subject crisp while allowing the city lights and skyline to blur smoothly into atmospheric distance. Professional editorial photography, photorealistic. Shot on a Canon EOS 5D Mark IV with an 85mm f/1.8 lens; aperture around f/2.0 for pronounced background bokeh and strong subject isolation. Natural optical depth of field with realistic blur; crisp subject focus. Physically plausible warm sunset lighting with soft shadows and gentle tonal transitions. True-to-life colors with warm, hazy grading consistent with an urban sunset. Subtle photographer-style post-processing, realistic color grading, moderate contrast. High-resolution, ultra-detailed, sharp image quality (8k). Natural matte skin texture, visible pores, subtle micro-details; no plastic smoothing. NEGATIVE PROMPT: CGI, 3D render, fake, artificial, synthetic, plastic skin, wax skin, rubbery skin, airbrushed skin, over-smoothing, AI artifacts, digital artifacts, jpeg artifacts, pixelation, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, disfigured, mutated, heavy makeup, beauty filters, glamour retouching, overly youthful/teenage appearance, unnatural glow, fake shine, extreme cinematic lighting, harsh HDR, motion blur, out of focus (unless intentionally present), distortion, out of frame.

prompts.title: Ethereal Motion Blur Portrait
prompts.prompt: A soft-focus, cinematic portrait of a young woman with delicate facial features and light golden hair, caught in motion. Her face appears partially blurred and ghosted, with flowing strands of hair captured mid-sway, creating a dreamy, ethereal motion effect. Her expression is serene and slightly distant, with parted lips and eyes softly open.The entire frame is bathed in golden beige and sepia tones, evoking a nostalgic, painterly atmosphere. The lighting is natural and diffused, coming from a nearby window, casting a warm glow on her skin and illuminating the strands of hair that dance across the frame. Photographed with a Canon EOS R5 using an 85mm lens at f/1.2, ISO 320, shutter speed 1/8s with intentional slow exposure and handheld movement to create the artistic motion blur. The focus is soft, with a shallow depth of field that isolates the subject from the pale, creamy background. Post-processed in Adobe Lightroom and Photoshop: cinematic LUTs applied, warmth enhanced through split-toning (shadows in soft amber, highlights in cream), clarity reduced, and motion streaks refined with displacement layers and radial blur filters. A very subtle fine grain adds a filmic mood: emotional, hazy, poetic. Style references: fine art portraiture, vintage editorial, and analog dream sequences. 4K ultra-resolution, no harsh contrasts, smooth gradients preserved.

prompts.title: Bio-Inspired Industrial Shoe Design Board
prompts.prompt: do this for {argument name="animal count" default="3 random animals"} for a {argument name="product" default="shoe"} IMAGE = Σ(w_i × β_i) → target render // Σ(w_i) = 1.0 BASIS_DECOMPOSITION FROM {product} + {bio_sources}: β1 : INFER(product_category_aesthetic FROM product. design_language) w = INFER(weight FROM product.visual_identity_strength) β2 : INFER(biological_intelligence FROM bio_sources[].evolutionary_solutions) w = INFER(weight FROM bio_sources[].advantage_significance) β3 : INFER(engineering_translation FROM biomimicry_methodology) w = INFER(weight FROM product.technical_complexity) β4 : INFER(industrial_design_presentation FROM portfolio_aesthetic) w = INFER(weight FROM audience.professional_level) β5 : INFER(educational_diagram FROM design_process_documentation) w = INFER(weight FROM instructional_clarity_need) INTERSECTION_RULES: β[bio] ∩ β[product] = naive_prototype_v1 // literal translation β[bio] ∩ β[engineering] = refined_prototype_v2 // working solution β[v2] ∩ β[product] = final_components // production parts β[presentation] ∩ β[education] = grid_layout // 4-column progression FOR EACH bio_source: col_1 = β[bio] col_2 = β[bio] ∩ β[product] → ❌ failure col_3 = β[bio] ∩ β[engineering] → ✓ success col_4 = β[v2] ∩ β[product] GLOBAL_CONSTRAINT: layout = 4_columns × N_rows (N = count bio_sources) footer = integrated_product (ALL col_4 components combined) style = β[presentation] — clean, white bg, professional OUTPUT_CONSTRAINTS: resolution : 8K landscape render : Octane | industrial_design_board typography : sans_serif | hierarchical | callouts + annotations lighting : INFER(studio_rig FROM β[product]) negative_β : INFER(anti_patterns FROM β1..β5) // TUNING KNOBS: // β[bio]++ → more nature photography, less product renders // β[engineering]++ → more technical diagrams, failure analysis detail // β[presentation]++ → more portfolio polish, less educational scaffolding // β[education]++ → more annotations, process transparency
prompts.description: A highly technical and programmatic prompt for generating industrial design boards for shoes inspired by biological structures.

prompts.title: Cinematic Automotive Triptych Portrait Prompt
prompts.prompt: Transform this image [UPLOAD YOUR IMAGE] into a 64K DSLR shot resolution of a ultra-hyperrealistic gritty, cinematic triptych-style portrait featuring a modern urban automotive lifestyle scene. The image is divided into three horizontal frames stacked vertically, each telling a different part of the story. Top frame: An intense close-up of a man’s face (same face as the uploaded image) reflected in a car’s side mirror. His expression is focused, calm, and determined. Soft natural light highlights skin texture, subtle stubble, and sharp facial features. The shallow depth of field blurs the background, creating a cinematic, introspective mood. Middle frame: A full-body shot of the same man leaning casually against a sleek black muscle car (Ferrari-style). He stands confidently in an industrial alleyway surrounded by concrete walls and urban architecture. Outfit: fitted black graphic t-shirt, slim gray trousers, brown low-top sneakers. Hands relaxed in pockets, posture confident but effortless. The car's glossy black paint reflects the surroundings, emphasizing power and elegance. Low-angle perspective adds dominance and strength. Bottom frame: A dramatic rear shot of the car, taillights glowing softly. A custom license plate is centered, adding authenticity and personality. The alley fades into darkness, with leading lines drawing attention to the vehicle's aggressive stance. Environment & Mood: Urban, industrial alley, concrete textures, muted tones. Mood: confidence, ambition, independence, modern masculinity. Atmosphere feels like a high-end automotive editorial or cinematic lifestyle campaign. Style & Technical Details:- Ultra-hyperrealistic photography Cinematic color grading (cool shadows, neutral highlights) High contrast with controlled blacks Shallow depth of field Soft natural lighting mixed with ambient city light Subtle film grain Sharp focus on subject, background slightly desaturated Camera & Quality: Shot on full-frame DSLR / mirrorless 35mm and 85mm lens combination Low ISO, crisp details 8K ultra-high resolution Professional automotive photography, editorial quality. Octane render, Ultra-hyperrealistic & Unreal Engine 5.
prompts.description: A highly detailed, structured prompt designed to transform an uploaded image into a hyperrealistic, cinematic triptych-style portrait focused on a modern urban automotive lifestyle scene, emphasizing high resolution and professional photography techniques.

prompts.title: Scribbly MS Paint Redraw
prompts.prompt: Take the exact face from the attached reference image as the primary subject. Use the precise facial features, bone structure, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, and expression of the woman shown in the reference photo. Maintain her exact face with high fidelity as the core element, but redraw the entire image in the most {argument name="style" default="clumsy, scribbly, and utterly pathetic way"} possible. Create a terrible amateur {argument name="software" default="MS Paint drawing"} on a {argument name="background" default="pure white background"} using only a mouse, with jagged, uneven lines, horrible proportions, and obvious mistakes everywhere. Make the hair look like it was drawn with the pencil tool in 5-pixel strokes, messy and scribbly with random stray lines sticking out. The eyes should be slightly misaligned, one bigger than the other, with crooked eyelashes and uneven pupils. The nose should be awkwardly shaped, the mouth lopsided and poorly filled. Skin should have visible pixelation, blotchy coloring, and bad airbrush attempts. Add terrible shading that looks like it was done with the spray can tool in MS Paint, with harsh edges and color bleeding. Dress her in a poorly drawn version of the reference outfit using blocky shapes, wrong perspective, and mismatched colors. The hands and fingers must look broken and deformed, with extra or missing fingers. Pose her in a similar position to the reference but make the anatomy completely wrong — shoulders at odd angles, neck too long or too short, head floating unnaturally. Emphasize the low-quality pixel-by-pixel feel with visible compression artifacts, dithering, and 1990s Windows 95 aesthetic. The overall drawing should be vaguely similar to the reference but also not really — kind of matching but off in a confusing, awkward, and hilarious way. Proportions should be ridiculous, symmetry completely broken, colors oversaturated or completely wrong in places. Include random MS Paint artifacts like leftover selection marquees, thick black outlines that don’t match, and clumsy fill bucket overflows. The background must be completely white with no extra elements except maybe a few accidental scribbles or stray pixels. Make it look like a child or a very unskilled adult spent 10 minutes struggling in MS Paint. Prioritize maximum pathetic quality — the worse it looks, the better. prompts.title: PS1 Retro Gaming Style Prompt
prompts.prompt: Transform the entire image into an authentic screenshot captured directly from a {argument name="console era" default="late-1990s PlayStation 1 (PS1)"} video game running on original hardware. Re-render every single element of the scene — every object, character, surface, background, lighting, and detail — as {argument name="geometry style" default="low-polygon 3D models"} with clearly visible triangular facets, flat angular geometry, and no smoothing or subdivision whatsoever. Use extremely low-resolution textures (256×256 pixels or smaller) that are blurry, pixelated, and heavily compressed, with obvious tiling seams, mipmapping artifacts, and poor UV mapping. Apply classic PS1 affine texture mapping across all surfaces so textures visibly stretch, warp, wobble, and distort unnaturally with any change in perspective or camera angle (especially noticeable on floors, walls, and curved objects). Remove all anti-aliasing entirely — every edge must be sharply jagged and aliased with prominent stair-stepping. Use only basic flat shading or simple Gouraud vertex shading with no dynamic lights, no real-time shadows, no specular highlights, and no advanced effects. Simulate the PS1’s 16-bit color depth and 5-5-5 RGB limitations by introducing visible checkerboard or ordered dithering patterns in all color gradients, skies, shadows, and semi-transparent areas to prevent banding. Include typical PS1 graphical quirks: subtle vertex snapping/jitter/wobbling on moving or angled geometry, minor polygon pop-in or Z-fighting where appropriate, and a limited draw distance that may softly fade into a low-detail fog. The overall resolution should feel like a raw {argument name="resolution" default="320×240"} or 640×480 PS1 framebuffer output, giving the whole image a slightly soft yet crunchy retro pixel look when viewed at modern sizes. Preserve the original scene composition and camera angle exactly, but convert everything into this pure PS1 3D style as if the photo itself were modeled and rendered inside an actual PS1 game. No text overlays, no HUD elements, no subtitles, no menu graphics, no scanlines, no CRT curvature, and no modern post-processing of any kind — just a clean, direct screenshot from the console’s video output.
prompts.description: A comprehensive prompt designed to transform an image into a low-poly PlayStation 1 era video game screenshot, featuring authentic technical artifacts.

prompts.title: 2.5D Illustration Cleanup and Enhancement
prompts.prompt: Overall redraw and optimization of the image without changing the {argument name="original composition" default="original composition"}, {argument name="character pose" default="character pose"}, character design, original lighting effects, and lens relationship. Maintain the {argument name="illustration style" default="2.5D Japanese illustration style"}, but reconstruct the frame for a cleaner, more unified visual output. Perform global readjustment of color and lighting on the existing image so that the overall light and shadow relationship follows a single, stable lighting logic. Use a soft, uniform primary light source, avoiding layered shadows and fractured color blocks caused by multiple light sources. Shadow edges should transition naturally without hard boundaries or blocky filling. Unify material representation, ensuring continuous gradient structures in the color transitions of skin, hair, and clothing, reducing local noise, color block accumulation, and non-continuous shadow areas. Avoid any mosaic, dirty spots, or cloud-like color structures. The overall style should be within the high-quality 2.5D animation illustration range, with a slight sense of volume and soft spatial depth, but without introducing realistic skin textures, pore details, or photographic sharpening effects. Retain a moderate hand-painted feel and smooth color gradations. Reduce local high-frequency detail interference, avoid over-sharpened edges and excessive texture enhancement, and give the picture a clean visual fluidity and unified color rhythm. Keep character outlines and hair structures continuous, smooth, and consistent, avoiding edge jitter, breakage, or granular jaggedness. Lines should resemble stable hand-drawn animation line art rather than boundaries formed by local sharpening or noise stacking. Outline changes should transition smoothly without local 'jumps' or irregular fluctuations. Overall reduce microscopic contrast and local sharpening tendencies, keeping edge transitions soft for visual fusion. Avoid knife-cut hard edges or overly clear separation at the boundaries of skin, hair, and clothing. Highlights and shadows should be connected by flexible gradients rather than sharp-line structures. The overall look should be 'clear but not sharp,' retaining physical recognition while suppressing pixel-level sharpening marks. The final output should be a clear, soft, high-quality 2.5D illustration without regional contamination, featuring a stable lighting system, continuous line structures, and natural gradient transitions.
prompts.description: A detailed optimization prompt for refining 2.5D illustrations. It fixes artifacts, uneven coloring, and over-sharpening while preserving the original character design and composition. Ideal for high-definition redrawing and achieving a clean, anime-style finish.

prompts.title: Human Anatomy Educational Infographic
prompts.prompt: This combination infographic, based on images of the {argument name="subjects" default="human heart and brain"}, provides a comparative and complementary look at the body’s most vital organs. The central section features a detailed internal cross-section of the heart on the left and a detailed, regionalized map of the brain (Frontal, Parietal, Temporal, and Occipital lobes) on the right. Below the heart, the "Cardiac Cycle" and "Blood Flow Path" diagrams are presented. To the left, a vertical sequence detailing the brain’s "Frontal Lobe," "Temporal Lobe," and "Cerebellum" (with descriptions of functions like memory, motor control, and reasoning) matches the structure of the cardiac information. Above the brain diagram, a revised "Key Regions & Functions" list replaces the chambers and valves, and below it, a revised "Top 5 Brain Functions" list includesCognition & Thinking, Sensory Processing, and Emotion Regulation. Both columns share common "Optimization Tips," "Risks & Warnings" (tailored to each organ's respective risks, such as cardiovascular disease vs. neurodegenerative disease), and "Quick Summary Cards," highlighting the heart as the body's pump and the brain as its control center, emphasizing their integrated nature and critical roles. The entire layout is structured to facilitate a direct side-by-side analysis, making it an exhaustive and cohesive educational tool.
prompts.description: A comprehensive infographic prompt for comparing the human heart and brain, featuring anatomical diagrams and summary cards in a clean illustrative style.

prompts.title: Weekly Schedule Template for VTubers
prompts.prompt: Create a "Weekly Schedule" template image for VTubers and streamers. Horizontal 16:9, size 1920x1080, flat, neat, print-like design (vector style). The overall look should be cute pastel tones (gentle colors like pale pink, mint, lavender), prioritizing readability without clutter. Layout specification: ・Place the schedule section top-aligned on the left 60% of the screen. ・7 rows (Days of the week: "Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, Sun"). ・Each row consists of a "Day label (small round badge)" + "Horizontal blank box for writing plans." ・The blank box must be completely empty. Absolutely do not include sample text (e.g., 'Plan here', 'SAMPLE', 'MEMO', etc.). ・The right 40% of the screen is empty space for later synthesis of a standing character image. Do not draw people, animals, mascots, or silhouettes. The background should only be a faint gradient and subtle abstract patterns of small stars/hearts/dots. Text specification: ・The only text to include is "Weekly Schedule" and "Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun" (in Japanese). ・Do not include any other text (SNS, date range, warnings, logos, hashtags, watermarks). ・The font should be rounded Gothic style, easy to read, and legible even on a white background. Finishing: ・Ensure ample margin around the perimeter, and elements on the left and right sides do not overlap. ・No logo.
prompts.description: A detailed prompt designed for Nano Banana Pro to create a clean, flat, and cute pastel-toned weekly schedule template suitable for VTubers and streamers. It includes specific layout instructions, size specifications (1920x1080, 16:9), and strict rules about text inclusion and empty space for later character synthesis.

prompts.title: Fashion Week Backstage Contact Sheet
prompts.prompt: Ultra-photorealistic editorial collage arranged as a 5x3 backstage fashion week contact sheet. Fifteen photographs capture the same striking {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} throughout a hectic runway day with perfect identity consistency. Same facial structure, sharp jawline, expressive eyes, realistic skin texture, subtle luxury makeup, natural hair strands, identical appearance in every frame. She wears a structured black tailored blazer over a minimalist silk outfit, paired with designer accessories and runway-ready styling. Hair is styled into a sleek fashion-week look. Each frame captures a different backstage moment: * Makeup artist making final touch-ups. * Reviewing looks in front of illuminated mirrors. * Walking through crowded backstage corridors. * Speaking with designers. * Adjusting jewelry. * Looking through garment racks. * Sitting quietly before the show. * Fast-paced candid moments between preparations. * Reflection shots through mirrors. * Runway entrance anticipation. * Close beauty portraits. * Walking beneath spotlights. * Looking over shoulder backstage. * Checking notes and schedules. * Final confident portrait before stepping onto the runway. Environment filled with makeup stations, bright vanity bulbs, clothing racks, photographers, assistants, models, and fashion industry energy. Photography style: documentary fashion photography, magazine contact sheet aesthetic, realistic flash photography, Leica and medium-format camera look, authentic behind-the-scenes storytelling. Color palette: black, silver, cream, warm skin tones, bright backstage lighting. Negative Prompt: flowers, studio backdrop, fantasy, CGI, illustration, plastic skin, duplicate poses, bad anatomy, watermark, text, blurry faces.
