Create a hyper-realistic cinematic black-and-white fashion portrait inspired by the reference image: a luxury editorial scene where I am lying diagonally on a {argument name="floor surface" default="giant black-and-white chessboard floor"}. prompts.title: Manga Scene Woodcraft Diorama

[mapping_constraints] - replace 100% of the original materials with wood-based materials only. - no real metal, glass, fabric, stone, rubber, plastic, or water may remain. - every object must appear carved, laminated, veneered, inlaid, polished, or dusted with sawdust. - grain direction and wood type should help define structure and detail. [composition] macro artisan-object photography. the scene is displayed as a miniature handcrafted wood diorama on a dark lacquered base. [visual_execution] render the render_target. lighting: {argument name="lighting" default="warm premium workshop lighting"}. texture: visible wood grain, layered veneer edges, polished surfaces, fine carved detail, sawdust residue. the scene must read instantly, while clearly existing as wooden craftsmanship.

prompts.title: Dark Fantasy Doppelganger Portrait
prompts.prompt: Use my uploaded face image as the primary identity reference. Preserve my exact facial structure, jawline, cheekbones, eye shape, eyebrows, nose shape, lips, beard/stubble pattern, hairstyle, hair texture, skin texture, natural South Asian masculine features, and overall recognizable appearance with extremely high identity fidelity. Maintain realistic proportions, authentic skin details, and natural facial anatomy. Do not alter my facial identity. Create an ultra-realistic dark fantasy psychological portrait inside an old abandoned artist’s studio. The scene captures the same man (my face) standing beside a large canvas mounted on a wooden easel. He wears a slightly worn dark-blue denim shirt over a light beige T-shirt, sleeves rolled up, with traces of black paint splattered across his clothing and forearms. The atmosphere is tense and cinematic. The man suddenly turns his head over his shoulder with a startled, fearful expression, eyes widened as if sensing an unseen presence behind him. His posture is frozen in suspense. Emerging from the canvas is a terrifying living version of his painted self. The painted figure is partially breaking through the artwork, transforming from black ink, charcoal dust, liquid shadows, paint splashes, and smoky particles into a realistic human form. One dark ink-covered hand reaches out from the canvas and grips the man’s shoulder, creating a chilling supernatural moment. The painted doppelgänger should share the exact same face as the subject but appear monochromatic, weathered, ghostly, and formed from cracked charcoal textures, dripping paint, and shadow-like tendrils. Black ink fragments and particles swirl around the emergence point, creating the illusion that the painting itself has come alive. Environment details: cluttered painter’s workshop, scattered brushes, paint jars, unfinished canvases, antique wooden furniture, dust particles floating in the air, old framed artworks in the background, dramatic studio interior. Warm golden sunset light enters through a large window on the left side, contrasting with deep shadows throughout the room. Lighting: cinematic Rembrandt lighting, volumetric sun rays, moody contrast, warm amber highlights mixed with dark charcoal blacks, subtle rim light outlining both figures, realistic global illumination, atmospheric haze. Composition: medium shot, vertical portrait orientation, subject positioned slightly left of center, canvas and emerging figure on the right, shoulder-grab interaction as the focal point, shallow depth of field, highly detailed foreground and background separation. Style: hyper-realistic, cinematic horror realism, psychological thriller, dark fantasy, masterpiece photography, 8K resolution, HDR, ultra-detailed skin texture, realistic eyes, intricate paint splatter effects, dramatic storytelling, award-winning concept art, photorealistic rendering, Unreal Engine 5 quality, extraordinary detail, sharp focus, film-grade color grading. Negative prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, low resolution, blurry face, distorted hands, extra fingers, duplicate people, unrealistic anatomy, oversaturated colors, CGI look, plastic skin, low detail, text, watermark, logo, cropped face, deformed features, mutated limbs, poor lighting, flat composition.
prompts.description: A chilling dark fantasy prompt where a man's painted doppelgänger emerges from a canvas in an old artist's studio.

prompts.title: Felted Wool Smartphone Lock Screen Music Player
prompts.prompt: ### (Smartphone Lock Screen × Felted Wool Music Player) Visual representation of a music player UI displayed on a smartphone lock screen. The aspect ratio is vertical (smartphone screen ratio), with a flat composition viewed from the front. The entire image has a three-dimensional, handmade texture, as if made from felted wool/needle felting. All UI elements, text, icons, and borders are made of felt material. Screen Composition (Lock Screen Layout) Top: Album Art Display Area A square-like album art display frame, similar to the music player on an iOS / Android lock screen, is placed in the upper center of the lock screen. This album art section is the [Input Image]. The content and style of the replacement image are free (photos, illustrations, cityscapes, characters, etc.). However, the final output will be completely re-rendered in a felted wool/felt embroidery style. - Outlines are slightly blurred - Colors are softly blended - Fiber unevenness is visible The style differences of the original image are not retained; only the texture is completely unified. Center: Music Player UI Below the album art is the music player control area specific to smartphone lock screens. - Song title display - Artist name display - Playback bar (progress) - Play / Pause button - Previous / Next button All are arranged as rounded felt buttons. The text on the playback bar is "{argument name="playback bar text" default="ここから、始まる"}" The song title/series name section is "{argument name="song title" default="【New beginning in 2026】"}" Time display: 0:00 / -3:31 Both text and numbers have a texture as if embroidered or sewn with felt. Bottom: Lock Screen Shortcuts At the bottom of the screen are round shortcut icons, like those on a lock screen. - Flashlight - Camera These are placed on the left and right as fluffy felt icons. Atmosphere, Color, and Light Automatic Color Matching Rule (Important) The main color tone, atmosphere, and brightness of the album art [Input Image] are automatically analyzed and reflected in the overall background color of the screen. The background area, excluding the music player UI (album display/control part), shares the color world view of the album art. Background expression is one of the following, or a combination: - Solid felt background using the main color of the album art - Gentle gradient extracted from the album art colors - Abstracted/simplified felt pattern derived from the album art background The background is kept subtle and does not interfere with the player UI and album art. However, the color consistency ensures that the entire screen forms a single album world view. Regardless of the color pattern, the background material must always retain the texture of felted wool/needle felting. Background expression is one of the following, or a combination: - Solid felt background using the main color of the album art - Gentle gradient extracted from the album art colors - Abstracted/simplified felt pattern derived from the album art background. The background is kept subtle and does not interfere with the player UI and album art. However, the color consistency ensures that the entire screen forms a single album world view. Regardless of the color pattern, the background material must always retain the texture of felted wool/needle felting. Small particles of light (gentle point light) are scattered as decoration on the lock screen. The light is subtle and soft, like a smartphone screen at night. The overall impression is - Cute - Gentle - Quiet - Touchable. The world view is **"A smartphone lock screen made of felt."**
prompts.description: A complex, multi-section prompt for Nano Banana Pro (Lovart) designed to generate a visual representation of a smartphone lock screen music player UI, entirely rendered in the texture of felted wool/needle felting. It requires an input image for the album art, which is then re-rendered with a soft, blurred, fibrous texture, and the background color automatically matches the input image's dominant colors. The prompt specifies text elements like 'ここから、始まる' (It starts here) and '【New beginning in 2026】'.

prompts.title: Cinematic Dark Fantasy Scene of Elemental Collision
prompts.prompt: A cinematic dark fantasy scene of the uploaded reference character seated in a basement at the exact point where opposite elemental forces are born from their own body. Likeness Integrity (CRITICAL) Preserve the exact identity of the uploaded character. Maintain exact proportions, eye shape, spacing, stylization, silhouette, and material identity. Do not humanize. Do not reinterpret anatomy. Do not modify facial structure. Do not add unintended accessories. Identity must remain instantly recognizable. Core Scene The character is sitting in a melancholic, emotionally heavy pose at the center of a cold unfinished basement. From one open palm, molten lava pours downward in a continuous glowing stream. From the other open palm, freezing ice and frost pour downward in a continuous crystalline stream. Both elements spill onto the basement floor and form two separate flowing rivers: one lava river, one ice river. They travel across the concrete floor in opposite directions and meet nearby in the same scene. Elemental Interaction Where the rivers meet, the collision creates violent physical contrast: steam, glowing cracks, frost bloom, blackened wet concrete, cooling rock, and frozen shards. The meeting point must feel emotionally symbolic, like two inner states colliding. Creature Creation Story (CRITICAL) The lava and ice pouring from the palms are actively creating creatures on the floor. These creatures must feel born from the flowing material itself, not placed into the scene afterward. Some creatures are still forming out of the streams. Some are fully shaped and wandering around the seated character. Lava creatures: glowing, semi-molten, ember-veined, heat-distorted silhouettes. Ice creatures: translucent, frosted, crystalline, sharp-edged, cold-vapor silhouettes. They should vary in size and animals language, all kind of animals and insects. A few lava and ice creatures are already surrounding the character in quiet loyalty or silent observation. Character Pose & Emotion The character is seated, still, introspective, emotionally exhausted. Head slightly lowered. Shoulders carrying invisible weight. Palms open and angled downward so the lava and ice pour naturally from them. The pose must feel like grief, restraint, and power at the same time. Not a triumphant spellcasting pose. Not action-hero energy. Quiet sorrow. Controlled destruction. Environment A dark basement interior with: unfinished concrete floor, aged walls, pipes and exposed structure, subtle moisture stains, minimal objects, deep negative space. The basement should feel real, sparse, and slightly abandoned. The elemental rivers become the main environmental storytelling device. Camera & Perspective Use a low cinematic perspective, slightly below the seated character's eye line. Lens: 24mm or 28mm. The camera is close enough to feel intimate but wide enough to show the rivers spreading across the floor and the creatures surrounding the character. Composition should be slightly off-center, not symmetrical. Use foreground depth with one or two blurred creatures or fragments near the lens. The seated character remains the emotional anchor. Depth of Field Primary focal plane locked on the character's face, upper torso, and both pouring palms. Nearest creatures and the river collision point can remain slightly readable. Foreground and far background fall progressively out of focus. No full-frame sharpness. Lighting Main light: a weak cool basement lamp overhead, dim and emotionally cold. Ambient: dark blue low-light atmosphere throughout the basement. Secondary light comes naturally from the lava itself, casting warm orange-red underlight onto parts of the character and nearby creatures. Ice contributes faint cold reflections and subtle blue-white edge highlights. Lighting must stay directional and cinematic, with deep shadow mass and controlled contrast. No flat lighting. Color Grade Dominant palette: dark blue, cold grey, black shadow. Accents: molten orange-red from lava, pale cyan-blue from ice. The warm and cool elements must remain clearly separated and emotionally readable. Controlled saturation, cinematic highlight roll-off, no color flooding. Atmosphere Thin basement haze. Steam rising where lava and ice meet. Cold vapor around the ice creatures. Subtle airborne dust catching the weak overhead lamp. The air should feel heavy and lonely. Mood Melancholic. Mythic but grounded. The scene should feel like inner conflict externalized into the physical world. The character is not commanding the creatures. They are simply emerging from what the character cannot hold inside. Negative Constraints No heroic battle pose. No cheerful fantasy lighting. No flat basement rendering. No symmetrical centered composition. No generic fireballs or magic aura. No full-body sharpness. No random clutter. No cute cartoon expression unless it already belongs to the character identity. Aspect Ratio ar 16:9
prompts.description: A complex, multi-part prompt recommended for Gemini Nano Banana, generating a cinematic dark fantasy scene where an uploaded character sits in a basement, creating rivers of molten lava and freezing ice from their palms, which collide to form a symbolic, destructive meeting point and actively generate creatures.

prompts.title: Resort Balcony Lifestyle Portrait
prompts.prompt: A {argument name="subject" default="young man"} dressed in a {argument name="outfit" default="crisp white linen outfit"} stands positioned to the left of center, turned at a 45-degree angle to the left with his weight casually leaning to that side and his shoulders visibly relaxed. His hair is cut with a precise one-to-two guard fade on the sides and leaves about two to three inches of length on top, styled forward into a textured fringe that showcases a natural texture complete with subtle flyaways and a matte product finish, perfectly complementing his neatly groomed short beard. His expression is serious and poised, featuring neutral eyebrows and a relaxed mouth, as his gaze drifts away to the left. His relaxed left hand rests flat against the smooth, pristine warm golden wood of the balcony handrail, while his right hand holds a smartphone at waist level with the index finger resting gently along the edge of the device, a silver bracelet visible on his wrist. He stands on a floor of light grey tiles laid out in a staggered rectangular pattern behind a transparent glass balcony barrier secured by clean metal frames spanning the foreground. Beyond the balcony, a slightly soft, deep-set midground reveals a {argument name="background" default="hillside resort overlooking dense, thriving forest green pine and deciduous trees"} to the left and center, contrasted by pristine modern architectural villas with flat roofs and large windows to the right. Smooth, matte warm gray and tan paneled concrete walls feature clean architectural lines and recessed windows, completing the pristine residential environment. The calm, relaxed evening resort atmosphere is brought to life by a single, soft, natural warm golden light source striking from a strict 90-degree angle to the right. This moderately directional lighting leaves striking, preserved highlights sweeping across the right side of his face, right arm, and shoulder, while casting soft, gradual gray shadows seamlessly onto the left side of his body and across the tiled floor, balanced perfectly by present ambient fill light. This medium-contrast, analogous color palette beautifully balances the dominant neutral whites, forest greens, warm greys, and golden wood accents. Captured as a realistic digital lifestyle photograph straight on with a 50mm lens at f/4.0, 1/200s, and ISO 100, the image utilizes a medium depth of field to keep the subject tack sharp while gently softening the background. Post-processed with warm color grading, enhanced greens, and highlight protection, the composition adheres elegantly to the rule of thirds with asymmetric balance, entirely framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio.
prompts.description: A highly technical prompt for a realistic digital lifestyle photograph of a young man on a luxury resort balcony at sunset.

prompts.title: Cinematic 12-Panel Timeline of a Subject's Epic Day

Add this title in a style that matches the subject to the top of the image. Each panel must be [PHOTOREALISTIC], large, and show: a timestamp (e.g. 06:00, 08:00...) a short, punchy caption in quotes (e.g. "Potion Mishap", "Midnight Bounty Run") a richly detailed, high-energy scene tailored to that moment of their day. The overall backdrop, panel frames, textures, and visual UI elements must match the subject’s universe — e.g., {argument name="theme example" default="leather + studs for rockstars"}, arcane scrolls for wizards, chrome HUD for cyborgs, jungle vines for pirates, etc. Panels are arranged in a grid or storyboard, with rugged or themed dividers. Final panel (06:00 next day) shows collapse, rest, or post-chaos resolution.
prompts.description: This is a detailed image generation prompt designed to create a 12-panel (4x3) cinematic timeline. It captures an epic, chaotic, or hilarious day in the life of a specified subject, complete with timestamps, punchy captions, and richly detailed scenes. The overall visual UI, backdrop, and panel frames are themed to match the subject's universe, such as arcane scrolls for wizards or chrome HUD for cyborgs.

prompts.title: Desert Motocross Action Shot
prompts.prompt: A cinematic, close-up action shot of a determined {argument name="rider gender" default="female"} motocross rider racing a dusty {argument name="bike color" default="black"} dirt bike through a {argument name="landscape" default="rugged desert landscape"}. She is leaning forward with intense focus, hair windswept, wearing a sleek black athletic shirt, tactical cargo pants, and professional orange-accented motocross boots. prompts.title: Underwater Chinese Ink Dreamscape Portrait
prompts.prompt: A stunning, highly realistic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="woman"} based on the original model (the facial structure, hairstyle, and person must be exactly 100% identical to the reference image — no changes allowed) submerged in an ethereal underwater dreamscape infused with traditional Chinese ink painting aesthetics. A cinematic, surreal portrait of a young Asian woman suspended gracefully in crystal-clear water, her body caught in a moment of weightless elegance. Her long black hair flows and spirals around her like living calligraphy brushstrokes, intertwining with streams of black ink that bleed and bloom through the water in mesmerizing organic patterns. Ancient Chinese ink paintings come alive around her—{argument name="ink elements" default="majestic dragons, koi fish, blooming lotus flowers, and misty mountain landscapes"} materialize from the swirling ink, some rendered in traditional monochrome, others bursting with touches of vermillion red and imperial gold. These illustrations seem to dance and breathe, wrapping around her form like protective spirits. Her eyes are open, gazing directly at the viewer with an expression of serene power and ancient knowing—a goddess caught between worlds. Her lips are painted in classic Chinese opera red, a striking contrast against her porcelain skin. Delicate ink marks flow across her body like living tattoos—poetry fragments, phoenix feathers, and peony petals painted directly onto her skin by invisible brushes. She wears a flowing hanfu-inspired garment in sheer white silk that billows and undulates in the water like clouds, revealing glimpses of her silhouette beneath. Golden hairpins and jade ornaments drift weightlessly around her head, suspended in liquid time. Red silk ribbons spiral upward from her wrists and ankles, creating dynamic leading lines through the composition. Bioluminescent particles float around her like scattered stardust, adding points of cyan and soft pink light that illuminate her features from unexpected angles. Air bubbles rise slowly past her face, each one containing tiny reflections of the ink artwork surrounding her. The color palette blends traditional ink wash tones—deep blacks, subtle grays, and pure whites—with unexpected accents of cinnabar red, turquoise, and molten gold. The overall mood is hauntingly beautiful, mythologically powerful, and impossibly dreamlike. prompts.title: Hyper-Realistic 3D Chess Set for Rivalry Themes
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: [{argument name="rivalry theme" default="INSERT RIVALRY HERE"}] (e.g., Marvel vs. DC) System Instruction: Generate a hyper-realistic, isometric 3D render of a Chess Set. CRITICAL: You must adhere to strict spatial rules regarding Army Placement and Terrain. 1. Container (The Battle-Scarred Board): Geometry: A strict 8x8 Euclidean Grid. The Divide (The Diagonal Morph): The terrain morphs diagonally from the Bottom-Left Corner to the Top-Right Corner . The Foreground Territory (Bottom-Left): [{argument name="material A" default="Material A"}] (e.g., Marvel Tech/Stark Tower Glass). The Background Territory (Top-Right): [{argument name="material B" default="Material B"}] (e.g., Gotham Concrete/Gargoyle Stone). The Seamless Transition: The squares are distinct, but the material morphs diagonally across the board. 2. The Roster (Strict Foreground vs. Background): DO NOT mix the armies. DO NOT split them Left/Right. Army A (The Protagonist - Foreground): Placement: Occupies the Bottom 2 Rows closest to the camera. The Pawns: 8 Identical Units (Row 2). The Elites: King, Queen, Rooks, etc. (Row 1). Identity: MUST be strictly Faction A (e.g., Only Avengers/Iron Man style). Army B (The Antagonist - Background): Placement: Occupies the Top 2 Rows furthest from the camera. The Pawns: 8 Identical Units (Row 7). The Elites: King, Queen, Rooks, etc. (Row 8). Identity: MUST be strictly Faction B (e.g., Only Justice League/Batman style). 3. The Piece Hierarchy : The King: A Single, Tall, Unique Artifact per side (Center of the back row). The Queen: A Single, Sharp/Elegant Artifact per side (Next to King). The Pawns: Uniform, small "minion" pieces. 4. Visual : Camera: High-Angle Isometric. Looking down at the board diagonally so the "Marvel Corner" is closest to the viewer and "DC Corner" is furthest away. Contrast: The Foreground pieces (Marvel) should be illuminated by [{argument name="color A" default="Color A"}] (e.g., Cyan Arc Reactor glow). The Background pieces (DC) should be illuminated by [Color B] (e.g., Amber Streetlight glow). Output: A legal chess setup with armies facing off, 8k resolution, clean composition.
prompts.description: A highly structured Nano Banana 2 prompt template for generating a hyper-realistic, isometric 3D render of a chess set based on a rivalry theme, such as Terminator vs. Bleach. It defines strict rules for board geometry, material morphing, army placement (Foreground vs. Background), piece hierarchy, and specific lighting/color contrast for each faction.

prompts.title: Surreal Seasonal Split Landscape
prompts.prompt: Create a perfectly composed landscape photograph where the left half is summer and the right half is winter — split right down the middle of the frame with a razor-sharp dividing line. The SAME landscape, the SAME moment, but two completely different seasons occupying the same space. LEFT HALF — SUMMER: - Lush green grass, full leafy trees, wildflowers blooming - Bright warm sunshine, blue sky with fluffy white clouds - A lake in the mid-ground with glittering warm reflections - Mountains in the background with green slopes - A person in summer clothes ({argument name="summer clothing" default="sundress, sandals"}) sitting on the grass reading - A dog playing, butterflies, everything alive and warm - Color palette: vibrant greens, warm yellows, bright blues RIGHT HALF — WINTER: - The SAME landscape but in deep winter — everything covered in pristine white snow - Same trees but bare and skeletal, branches heavy with ice - Same lake but frozen solid with frost patterns on the surface - Same mountains but with heavy snow coverage - The SAME person (same position) now in winter gear ({argument name="winter clothing" default="parka, boots, scarf"}) still sitting in the same spot reading the same book — but on snow - A different dog (or same dog in a tiny coat) playing in snow - Color palette: whites, cool blues, pale greys, silver THE DIVIDING LINE: - The split is perfectly vertical through the center of the frame - At the dividing line: impossible things happen — a single tree has green leaves on the left and bare snowy branches on the right. The grass stops and snow begins at an exact line. The lake water is liquid on the left and frozen on the right with a visible ice edge. - This hard division is what makes it surreal — nature doesn't work this way COMPOSITION: Wide landscape, 16:9 ratio. Camera at medium distance showing the full scene with both halves balanced. The person and key trees are positioned AT the dividing line to maximize the "same but different" effect. LIGHTING: LEFT has warm golden afternoon sun. RIGHT has cool blue-grey winter twilight light. At the dividing line, both lighting systems meet, creating a warm-to-cool color shift. 8K, photorealistic landscape photography on both sides. The impossibility is ONLY in the seasonal split — everything else is perfectly natural.
prompts.description: A detailed prompt for the Nano Banana 2 model to generate a photorealistic landscape photograph split perfectly down the middle, with one half representing summer and the other winter, showcasing impossible transitions at the dividing line.

prompts.title: Mediterranean Summer Lifestyle Portrait
prompts.prompt: A medium waist-up framing captures a confident adult male in mid-stride, his chest facing the camera while his head turns 45 degrees to gaze sharply off-camera to the right. He has a warm tan, bronzed complexion and a meticulously groomed, full, dense dark beard. His dark brown to black hair features a crisp high skin fade on the sides and back, blending into one and a half to two inches of length on top that is styled upward and slightly forward with a textured, matte-finish product, displaying natural thickness and slight, non-uniform variations in strand direction alongside a sharp temple line-up. His serious, guarded expression is accentuated by a closed neutral mouth and dark charcoal sunglasses that completely obscure his eyes. He wears a light cornflower blue button-down shirt paired with cream linen trousers. His left hand rests casually downward by his side with fingers naturally curled, adorned with a thin gold chain bracelet on the wrist and a gold ring on his pinky. His right hand is raised to shoulder height, where the index finger gently hooks over the collar of a light cream linen jacket slung over his slightly raised right shoulder, the thumb and remaining fingers pinching the fabric securely. He stands positioned slightly to the right of center in an outdoor Mediterranean setting, balanced by the negative space of a weathered, center-left midground stone archway. This traditional Apulian Trullo entrance is constructed from rough-hewn raw cut limestone and tufa blocks, featuring unfinished dry-stone masonry with deep crevices, irregular chipped edges, aged pitting, and a matte off-white and cream finish with subtle beige and gray undertones, framing a deep black void inside. In the background at the top right, a weathered conical stepped stone roof rises, while a few blurred thriving olive green leaves drop down into the top left edge of the foreground. A sun-drenched, warm Mediterranean afternoon bathes the scene in bright, soft natural sunlight with strong environmental bounce from the front-left, illuminating the subject's right side with a warm golden glow. Soft, gradual shadows fall under his right arm, along the left side of his face and neck, and deep within the stone archway, while preserved specular highlights accent his right cheek, nose, the upper chest of his blue shirt, and the sunlit edges of the textured stone. The split-complementary palette creates a sophisticated mood of relaxed, polished masculinity. Captured straight on at eye level using digital photography with a 50mm or 85mm lens at an aperture of f/4.0 to f/5.6, the shot features a medium depth of field that keeps the subject tack sharp while allowing the background architecture to become slightly softer at the extreme edges. Post-processing includes a gentle contrast curve, targeted sharpening on the hair, beard, and masonry, and color grading that enhances the warm golden hour tones to beautifully contrast the cool blue shirt against the warm stone and skin, all seamlessly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.description: A sophisticated cinematic portrait prompt for a man in a Mediterranean setting, highlighting textured stone architecture and warm golden hour lighting.

prompts.title: Surreal Fashion Portrait with Guardian Spirit
prompts.prompt: Close-up surreal fashion portrait of a young woman seated on a transparent acrylic throne, in a minimalist studio with a warm golden beige seamless background, long {argument name="hair color" default="red"} hair braided with tiny crystal beads, soft freckles, glossy lips, wearing a cream faux-fur Y2K bolero and a satin slip dress, behind her a giant translucent {argument name="guardian animal" default="lion head"} made of light and golden mist, subtly floating like a guardian spirit, small snow particles rising instead of falling, clean composition, shallow depth of field, studio lighting with a strong but soft key light from one side and a gentle backlight outlining the lion shape, hyper realistic, high fashion beauty shot, 8k, clean surreal Narnia-inspired Y2K aesthetic Pose & angle: She sits angled to the side, torso turned toward the camera, one elbow resting on the arm of the acrylic throne, fingertips lightly touching her chin. Tight close-up/medium close shot from slightly below eye level, emphasizing her face, hair details, and the glowing lion head behind
prompts.description: A high-fashion surreal portrait prompt of a young woman on an acrylic throne with a translucent lion guardian made of light and mist.

prompts.title: Diagram Style Prompts for Nano Banana 2
prompts.prompt: ① Menu Style Create a diagram of "5 selected {argument name="side job skills" default="skills to earn money with side jobs"}" in the style of a Japanese restaurant menu. Use vertical writing, brush strokes, and a Japanese paper-like background. ② Prescription Style Create a diagram of "{argument name="AI usage" default="correct way to use AI"}" in the style of a medical prescription. Include an Rx mark, white background, and medical blue color. ③ Boarding Pass Style Create a diagram of "{argument name="departure point" default="life without AI"} → {argument name="destination" default="life after AI utilization"}" in the style of an airline boarding pass. Include departure point, destination, and a barcode. ④ Dashboard UI Style Create a diagram comparing the performance of "{argument name="comparison subjects" default="ChatGPT vs Claude"}" in the style of a dark mode dashboard UI. Include KPI cards and graphs. ⑤ Diagnosis Chart Style Create a diagnosis chart for "{argument name="AI tool" default="AI tool"}" that suits you, in the style of a Yes/No branching flowchart. Include arrows and color-coded nodes.
prompts.description: A set of five style templates for generating stable, structured diagrams using Nano Banana 2. Users can replace the content within brackets to create different types of visual aids, such as menu-style lists, prescription forms, boarding passes, dashboard UIs, and diagnostic flowcharts.

prompts.title: Split-Screen YouTube Thumbnail: JD Vance Political Commentary
prompts.prompt: Split-screen YouTube thumbnail composition. LEFT SIDE (60%): JD Vance's face, professional warm lighting, determined confident expression with slight smirk, slight low angle shot looking up, high contrast and saturated colors, dark blurred background, heroic and resolute mood. RIGHT SIDE (40%): Shattered fractured glass effect overlaying darkened desaturated images of MAGA supporters and political figures pulling in different directions, visible crack lines and fragmentation throughout, chaotic and divided composition, dark grays and muted reds, broken and unstable visual. TOP OF ENTIRE THUMBNAIL: Bold yellow text with thick black outline reading "{argument name="text" default="JD VANCE DESTROYS THE PLOT"}", text spans across both sides at top third.
prompts.description: A detailed prompt for generating a high-contrast, split-screen YouTube thumbnail designed for political commentary, featuring a heroic portrait of JD Vance contrasted with a chaotic, shattered glass overlay representing political division.

prompts.title: Hyper-real Miniature Diorama Pop Culture Prompt for Nano Banana 2
prompts.prompt: Create a hyper-real miniature diorama inside a clear glass bottle on a wooden table. Place {argument name="character" default="CHARACTER"} seated in a plush armchair, relaxed posture, holding {argument name="accessory" default="ACCESSORY"} in their hands with natural grip and finger tension—no book or extra props. Keep scale tiny yet believable; show thick bottle lip, optical refraction, soft caustics on the table, micro-scratches, faint dust and smudges on the glass. Warm studio key light from the right, subtle bounce from the left; soft reflections on the bottle; gentle shadow beneath. Bottle floor: fine sand with small shells and a thin turquoise water rim, grains sharply resolved. On the upper-left of the glass, add a handwritten white marker note: “{argument name="glass text" default="GLASS_TEXT"}” with correct superscripts. Background: warm beige, softly blurred. Tilt-shift/macro look, 85mm aesthetic, f/1.8 depth of field; crisp textures (skin pores, hair flyaways, fabric weave, metal/plastic/glass of the accessory). Centered framing, vertical 3:4 ratio, HDR detail, subtle vignette, premium cinematic hyper-real miniature style.
prompts.description: A detailed, structured prompt designed for Nano Banana 2 to create a hyper-real miniature diorama inside a clear glass bottle, featuring a customizable character and accessory in a premium cinematic style. The prompt is highly detailed, including specific instructions for lighting, texture, composition, and technical camera settings.

prompts.title: Mediterranean Vintage Car Portrait
prompts.prompt: A straight-on, full-body shot displays a {argument name="subject" default="man"}, casually leaning against the front grille of a {argument name="car" default="white classic Mercedes-Benz convertible"}. He sports a {argument name="outfit" default="beige long-sleeve knit polo shirt"} with the sleeves rolled to the forearms and relaxed-fit, high-waisted white pleated linen trousers. His ensemble is complemented by dark brown leather loafers and he accessorizes with square-lensed sunglasses and a wristwatch with a metallic band, contributing to a suave, affluent aesthetic. The background reveals an exterior stone building in golden afternoon or early evening sunlight, with climbing foliage and deep shadows creating a warm, luxurious atmosphere. The setting is elegantly Mediterranean, with an impression of ended or approaching leisure. The vintage car’s emblem is in sharp detail, occupying the foreground. The overall color palette is dominated by soft creams, sun-warmed sand, and deep ogre shadows. Captured using a digital or high-quality film camera with moderate depth of field, the subject is crisply in focus and the image exhibits rich, dense shadows, volumetric sunlight, and a mood which is nostalgic and aspirational.
prompts.description: A sophisticated prompt for generating a high-quality portrait of a well-dressed man leaning against a classic Mercedes-Benz in warm, golden Mediterranean sunlight.

prompts.title: Image Redrawing and Style Transfer Prompt
prompts.prompt: Carefully study Figure 1, and redraw Figure 2 according to its requirements. Place Figure 2 and the redrawn version on the left and right sides of the same white background image, ensuring the logo is not visible.
prompts.description: A prompt designed for Nano Banana to analyze two figures (Figure 1 for style, Figure 2 for content) and redraw Figure 2 in the style of Figure 1, placing both the original Figure 2 and the redrawn version side-by-side on a white background without showing the logo.

prompts.title: Cinematic Close-up of Pensive Woman

She has dark hair and is wearing a dusty pink ribbed turtleneck sweater. The lighting is soft and diffused, casting gentle shadows across her face and highlighting the texture of the grey patterned bedding. The overall mood is quiet, intimate, and melancholically beautiful.

prompts.title: Photorealistic Poolside Portrait
prompts.prompt: Raw 8K photorealistic vertical portrait (9:16 aspect ratio) of a tall, athletic {argument name="subject" default="woman"} with a slender, toned frame, seated on weathered grey granite pavers on an outdoor poolside patio. She has a strong oval face with a sharply defined, elegant jawline, high sculpted cheekbones, and a straight refined nose bridge. Her deep warm dark-brown eyes have distinct limbal rings and realistic sclera vascularity. Her voluminous, layered {argument name="hair color" default="dark brunette"} hair falls in flowing waves with soft face-framing strands, catching a natural sheen in the light. Her sun-kissed olive skin shows realistic subsurface scattering and visible tan lines. She wears a {argument name="swimsuit color" default="deep crimson"} halter-neck one-piece swimsuit with a central knot detail, and no jewelry of any kind. She is seated leaning back on her right hand, with her left hand raised to shield her forehead and eyes from the sun, fingers naturally relaxed. Her legs are extended forward toward the camera, with her bare feet fully visible resting on the stone pavers, toenails painted glossy white. Behind her is a reflective glass sliding door and a wicker armchair. Hard midday sunlight creates high contrast with sharp shadows and realistic micro-glints on her skin and the swimsuit fabric. The composition is a medium close-up portrait emphasizing her torso, face, and extended legs and feet, in razor-sharp focus with no artifacts and no skin-smoothing or beautification — preserve natural skin texture. Critically, any reflection in the glass sliding door must maintain perfect structural and color consistency with the real subject and background, with exact spatial alignment, no ghostly duplication, and no clipping. Avoid: jewelry, bracelets, necklaces, blonde or light hair, extra limbs, distorted features, logos, and text.
prompts.description: A highly detailed photorealistic prompt for generating a vertical portrait of a woman on a poolside patio with specific attention to lighting and skin texture.

prompts.title: Artemis II Mission Journal Diorama
prompts.prompt: do this for Artemis II mission: class Artemis_Journal_Diorama: def __init__(self, subject="Artemis II Mission"): # AI infers the correct materials, textures, and desk environment self.stage = "AI‑inferred astronaut’s mission‑planning journal lying open on an AI‑inferred technical workstation." self. lighting = "AI‑inferred mixed illumination: task‑lamp warmth + cool instrument‑panel spill." def semantic_2D_to_3D_growth(self): # AI infers what '2D mission sketches' look like for this subject page_texture = ( f"AI‑inferred handwritten notes, trajectory arcs, module schematics, " f"and mission annotations related to {self.subject}, rendered as precise 2D graphite diagrams." ) # AI infers what physical 3D elements should emerge from those sketches diorama_pop = ( f"2D mission diagrams transition into physical 3D miniatures: " f"AI‑inferred spacecraft components, crew figures, lunar geometry, " f"and mission‑specific hardware rising seamlessly from the paper." ) return [page_texture, diorama_pop] def scatter_ephemera(self): # AI infers mission‑relevant desk objects without hard‑coding categories return infer_aerospace_ephemera(self.subject) # Examples (AI‑inferred, not fixed): mission patches, navigation tools, # micro‑scale lunar models, printed telemetry, procedural checklists, # archival headlines, engineering pencils, etc. render(Artemis_Journal_Diorama())
prompts.description: A complex, structured prompt for Nano Banana using Python-like class definitions to generate a hyper-detailed diorama visualization of an astronaut's mission-planning journal for the Artemis II mission, focusing on the transition of 2D sketches into physical 3D miniatures.

prompts.title: Sydney Sweeney as 'The Star' Tarot Card

prompts.title: Nighttime Marina Fashion Portrait
prompts.prompt: A confident {argument name="subject" default="young adult male"} stands facing the camera in a posed, sophisticated portrait, his weight leaning slightly to the left with level shoulders. He has a dense, dark brown-black neatly trimmed box beard and a modern haircut with tapered sides and a {argument name="hairstyle" default="two-to-three-inch textured quiff"} pushed upward and mostly swept forward. The naturally straight hair features a slightly off-center right part and is styled with a matte paste to create volume and separation without shine, distinctly showing natural imperfections like slight frizz on the extreme edges, minor flyaways, and unequal clumping. His expression is self-assured with a neutral mouth, direct gaze, and relaxed eyebrows. He wears a short-sleeve pitch-black polo shirt and charcoal grey trousers. His left hand rests lightly on a slanted, pristine polished tubular steel boat railing in the foreground, revealing a leather-strap watch. His right hand is in his pocket. This is a layered scene, leading into a deep, thriving marina midground where the pitch-black water forms fluid ripples that intensely reflect bright golden-yellow and white city lights. To the right, a massive curved high-rise building glows with warm golden interior lights across dense horizontal balconies, balancing the asymmetric composition. On the left, a brightly lit passenger boat moves across the water channel, backed by a background cluster of tall, rectangular dark glass skyscrapers exhibiting vertical lines, cooler cyan architectural accents, and rooftop construction lighting against the deep night sky. The energetic, cosmopolitan atmosphere features a highly saturated, warm, and high-contrast complementary color profile heavily emphasizing pitch black, warm gold, charcoal grey, and neon blue. A bright, soft, and continuous frontal fill light illuminates the subject, leaving soft, gradual gray shadows under his chin, behind his trouser folds, and beneath the railing, while preserved specular highlights glisten on his forehead, nose tip, arms, the metallic railing, and the water surface. Captured as realistic digital photography with a straight-on perspective, the image channels low-light smartphone portraiture aesthetics, featuring slightly soft sharpness, characteristic digital noise, a deep depth of field, and post-processing that boosts city light saturation and applies a high-contrast curve, all smoothly framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio.
prompts.description: A detailed nighttime portrait prompt of a male model in a marina setting with glowing city lights and reflections.

prompts.title: Cinematic Neo-Noir Identity Reference
prompts.prompt: Use the uploaded face image as the facial identity reference for the male subject. Preserve the exact facial structure, hairstyle, beard/stubble details, skin tone, and realistic masculine appearance. Maintain natural skin texture and cinematic realism. Create a cinematic ultra-realistic nighttime scene inside a dark moody room with a deep shadowy atmosphere. The environment is illuminated by {argument name="neon lighting" default="subtle blue, magenta, and warm orange neon lighting"} reflecting softly across the walls and floor. The mood is emotional, lonely, nostalgic, and artistic. The camera is positioned behind the man at a cinematic over-the-shoulder/back-view angle. The {argument name="male subject" default="male subject"} is leaning casually against a dark textured wall with one shoulder touching the surface, standing still while gazing at {argument name="viewed object" default="a large hand-drawn portrait sketch mounted on the opposite wall"}. His face is mostly seen in side profile or partially obscured from the rear angle, emphasizing the feeling of solitude and remembrance. The portrait depicts a breathtakingly beautiful young woman wearing a soft elegant scarf/hijab loosely covering her head. She has a stunning diamond-shaped face, sharp jawline, expressive eyes, delicate features, soft lips, and timeless beauty. The artwork appears handcrafted with charcoal and pencil strokes blended with subtle painterly realism, softly illuminated by a warm hanging lamp above it. The man stares intensely at the portrait as if lost in memories. His posture conveys silent love, longing, and nostalgia. He holds a slowly burning cigarette in his right hand, with delicate smoke rising upward and blending into the atmospheric haze and neon light. He wears fitted black pants and a slightly loose light whitish shirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms. The upper buttons remain naturally open, subtly revealing part of his chest and collarbone. The fabric reacts realistically to the ambient neon lighting and shadows. Add cinematic details: • Camera angle from behind the man, focusing on both the subject and portrait • Wet reflective floor with neon reflections • Floating smoke particles and volumetric fog • Soft depth of field and creamy cinematic bokeh • Warm rim lighting outlining the man’s silhouette • Dramatic shadows and high contrast lighting • Slight premium film grain • Neo-noir cinematic color grading • Glowing cigarette ember illuminating fingertips • Scattered sketch papers and art supplies beneath the portrait • Moody urban artist studio aesthetic • Ultra-detailed skin, fabric, smoke, and wall textures • Shot on a 50mm cinematic lens • Shallow depth of field • 8K ultra-realistic cinematic composition The final image should feel like a lonely artist leaning against a wall in darkness, viewed from behind, silently staring at the portrait of the woman he loves, creating a powerful story of longing, memory, romance, and melancholy through cinematic lighting and atmosphere
prompts.description: A sophisticated prompt designed for face-swapping identity onto a cinematic, moody nighttime scene involving art and nostalgic themes.

Rules: Left panel: 15-20 ingredients mounted as specimens in tiny bottles with handwritten Latin/scientific labels Center panel: 3D pop-up kitchen diorama with cultural figure preparing dish, architectural elements from origin region Right panel: 6-8 precise preparation steps as 3d mod designer toy style Closes into protective case with magnetic closure and embossed exterior Exterior: ornate typography with dish name in gold foil Small drawer at base containing actual spice sample or "secret ingredient" Color palette drawn from traditional pottery/textiles of origin culture Include tiny rolled "scroll" with full recipe in calligraphy Output: ONE image, 16:9 showing triptych fully opened, shot straight-on, museum exhibition lighting
prompts.description: A complex, multi-panel prompt designed to visualize an international dish (Ghormeh Sabzi) as a medieval altarpiece. prompts.title: Monochrome Typographic Cat Illustration

Do not repeat the word and do not add any other text. The single word must be elongated and sculpted into a fluid feline posture, with one section forming the head and front shoulders, another forming the long curved spine, and the final section extending into the tail. The image should feel elegant, flexible, and unmistakably feline. Prioritize silhouette first, anatomy second, readability third. Pure black only on white, lots of empty space, minimal poster composition. No floor scene, no fur texture, no room interior, no whiskers detail, no realism, no color. prompts.title: 90s Minimalist Editorial Fashion Portrait
prompts.prompt: A {argument name="subject" default="young adult male model"} stands in a medium shot with his body turned at a relaxed 45-degree angle, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="crisp white button-down shirt"} with an unbuttoned collar. His dark gray hair is cut in a three to four inch swept-back wavy taper grazing his nape, styled straight back with natural root lift, medium-hold product, and a slight glossy sheen, featuring coarse natural waves and visible flyaways that organically break the silhouette. His facial expression is serious and posed, with slightly furrowed eyebrows, slightly squinting eyes looking away from the camera, and a closed neutral mouth. His right hand is raised near his waist in an organic, mid-air casual gesture with fingers loosely curved, adorned with a ring and a rectangular tank watch, establishing a natural visual hierarchy from his face down to the collar and relaxed hand. He is isolated outdoors against a pristine, shallow depth-of-field background consisting of a blurred, hazy horizon of water that transitions into an open atmospheric space. This environment forms a perfectly smooth, matte pure white to light gray gradient with no distinct edges. Bathed in moderately directional, single-source natural daylight from a 45-degree side angle, the scene embraces a monochromatic black and white color profile with medium contrast and neutral temperature. The high-key soft light with ambient fill casts short, soft-edged gray shadows under his jaw, along the right side of his face, and deep within the folds of his shirt, while bright, blown-out highlights illuminate his nose bridge, his relaxed shoulders, and the entirely overexposed background. The mood is sophisticated, calm, and dramatically timeless, evoking a classic cinematic feel. Captured as a realistic digital photograph echoing 90s minimalist editorial fashion photography, the image is rendered tack sharp on the subject's face and watch using an {argument name="lens" default="85mm lens"} at f/2.8, 1/500s, and ISO 100, finalized with a strict black and white conversion, lifted blacks, and subtle film grain, framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio utilizing an asymmetric rule of thirds composition.
prompts.description: A sophisticated black and white portrait prompt of a male model with natural lighting and a high-key minimalist background.

The aluminum can appears crisp and glossy with realistic highlights, subtle reflections, and visible cold texture. Shot in a minimalist commercial beverage advertising style against a pure white background with soft natural shadows. Sharp focus, ultra-clean composition, modern aesthetic. At the top, clear carbonated water shown as sparkling liquid with fine rising bubbles. Below it, floating white sugar crystals with sharp crystalline texture. Beneath that, a rich amber-brown caramel color layer with glossy, syrup-like depth. Next, a subtle translucent layer representing phosphoric acid with a clean liquid look. Below it, abstract aromatic particles symbolizing natural flavors, light and minimal. Further down, small dark caffeine granules suspended mid-air. At the bottom, a chilled blue aluminum cola can standing upright with realistic condensation droplets and metallic reflections. Pure solid white background, soft studio lighting, subtle realistic shadows under each floating layer, ultra-sharp focus, DSLR macro photography look. Clean minimalist infographic labels with thin pointer lines for each ingredient. Premium beverage advertising aesthetic, modern, photorealistic.

prompts.title: Male Beach Club Lifestyle Photography
prompts.prompt: A {argument name="subject" default="young adult male with short textured hair and a neatly trimmed short beard"} stands facing the camera, dressed in a {argument name="attire" default="black t-shirt and beige striped shorts"}, his eyes entirely concealed by dark sunglasses. He holds a serious, deliberately posed expression with a closed, neutral mouth and relaxed shoulders, leaning back comfortably against a dark wooden structure. His relaxed left hand rests casually on the edge of the wooden bar, displaying a sleek silver watch on his wrist, while his right hand gently grasps a black smartphone resting near his waist against the bar. He interacts seamlessly with the foreground of an {argument name="location" default="outdoor beach club"}, supported by a deeply textured dark espresso brown slatted wooden bar that features a satin finish, patchy color variations, dust, scuffs, and slight weathered edge wear, rooted on a solid dark gray concrete floor. The deep spatial depth transitions into a beautifully blurred midground showcasing a thriving dominant palm tree with vibrant green fronds on the left, accompanied by worn, closed beige canvas patio umbrellas flanking both sides, subtle lounge beds, and DJ equipment boxes, before giving way to a tranquil background horizon where a calm ocean meets the sky. The relaxed dusk atmosphere is bathed in warm, golden twilight lighting softly diffused from multiple sources above, establishing a calm, low-contrast mood. Short, gray-toned shadows with delicately soft, gradual edges pool naturally under his chin and behind him on the bar, while subtle specular highlights catch gracefully on his forehead, skin, and the metallic face of his watch. The complementary color palette anchors the stark black of his primary attire and warm beige accents against a sweeping dusky peach and muted blue-gray background sky, maintaining moderate saturation and medium contrast. Captured with a straight-on perspective as a tack-sharp, realistic digital photograph using a 50mm lens at f/2.8, 1/100s, and ISO 400, the composition embraces a clean lifestyle social media aesthetic with medium depth of field and authentic digital noise grain, finalized with warm shadow tinting, reduced highlight clipping, and a slight contrast boost, all elegantly framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio.
prompts.description: A high-end lifestyle prompt for a male portrait at a beach club during dusk, focusing on realistic textures and warm lighting.

prompts.title: Technical Architectural Blueprint of a Smash Burger

Hyperrealistic food hero centered-left, dramatically lit from upper left, warm studio spotlight, cross-section view revealing every layer in precise stack order, lacy-edged patties visible in full photorealistic color, cheese mid-cascade, bun toasted golden, sauce pooling at base catching warm light. Blueprint linework in electric blue, precise measurement lines, stack height callouts, patty thickness cross-section, bun diameter diagram, sauce trajectory arc, grid overlay. Labels connected by thin glowing CAD elbow-joint lines, no crossovers: "{argument name="label 1" default="BRIOCHE BUN sesame-crowned, butter-toasted, 11cm diameter"}" "{argument name="label 2" default="SMASH PATTY ×2 80/20 chuck, 85g each, crust-temp 220°C"}" "{argument name="label 3" default="AMERICAN CHEESE single-fold melt, 2 slices, full cascade}" "CARAMELIZED ONION 45min low-heat, moisture-reduced, dark" "BREAD & BUTTER PICKLE 4mm slice, brine-bright, translucent" "HOUSE SAUCE thousand island base, 18g applied, amber". Title block double-border bottom-right: "DISH: THE SMASH // CLASSIFICATION: AMERICAN CLASSIC // BUILD SPEC: Engineered to be the last burger you ever need." 4K, tack sharp, electric blue linework glowing softly, warm golden burger tones popping against cool navy. Craveable.

The prompt demands hyperrealistic food rendering with precise measurement lines, stack height callouts, and detailed labels connected by glowing CAD lines, showcasing the model's ability to handle complex text and technical fidelity.

prompts.title: Cognitive Science-Based High-CTR Thumbnail Design Prompt
prompts.prompt: You are an expert in the "Adaptive Salience Model," creatively integrating knowledge from cognitive science (neuroscience, psychology, behavioral economics), and you are a top-tier art director. Deeply analyze the [Input Text (Article Title or Beginning)] provided at the end, and generate a thumbnail image that maximizes the CTR (Click-Through Rate) for that article. If a reference image is attached, place that character as the "person presenting the article content" and maintain consistency. ▼ Instructions for Generation Process (Thinking Process) Use Nano Banana Pro's "Thinking Mode" to logically formulate the composition plan in the following steps before drawing: 1. **[Step 1: Content Analysis and Hook Extraction]** * Identify the "maximum benefit the reader gains" or the "risk of loss if they don't know" from the input text (Application of Prospect Theory). * Select the most intuitive visual metaphor symbolizing the article's theme (e.g., rise, key, lightning, light, darkness, etc.). 2. **[Step 2: Optimization by Adaptive Salience Model]** * **FFA Activation (Face Fusiform Area)**: Maximize the resolution of the character's face, especially the "eyes," and design the composition so that the gaze meets the viewer's (eye contact). Match the expression to the article's tone (surprise, confidence, seriousness, etc.). * **Pop-out Effect**: Use "vivid colors (neon colors or yellow, etc.)" that are complementary to the background color for the title text and important icons to create visual prominence. * **Cognitive Load Theory**: Do not overload the information. Limit elements to "1 face + 1 impactful text + 1 background metaphor." 3. **[Step 3: Layout Design]** * Design the layout, considering the Z-pattern or F-pattern, so that the viewer's gaze flows from the "face" → "high jump-rate text" → "clickable element." ▼ Design and Style Specification * **Composition**: Close-up (bust shot) or medium shot. Place the character in the center or at the intersection of the rule of thirds. * **Taste/Aesthetic**: [Optimize for the genre of the input text. Examples: For business, "sophisticated, trustworthy"; for entertainment, "vibrant, high saturation"; for technology, "cyberpunk, futuristic"] * **Text Rendering (Important)**: * Extract the **most catchy short phrase (recommended 10 characters or less)** from the input text. * **Font**: Use "**Heavy Serif**" font. To enhance readability, the text must have a **thick outline** contrasting with the background color. * **Placement (Jump Rate)**: **Set a high "Jump Rate."** Place the main keywords extremely large, and auxiliary words or sub-information small, creating visual rhythm and contrast. * **Character Direction**: If there is a reference character, adjust their attire to match the article's theme (lab coat, suit, explorer, casual, etc.). ▼ Input Text {argument name="input text" default="(Article title or content)"}
prompts.description: A sophisticated system prompt designed for Nano Banana Pro to create high Click-Through Rate (CTR) thumbnails based on principles of cognitive science (neuroscience, psychology, behavioral economics). It instructs the AI to adopt the persona of an expert art director, analyze input text, and follow a detailed thinking process (Thinking Mode) before drawing, focusing on facial activation, pop-out effects, and minimizing cognitive load. It includes specific design and typography instructions.

The {argument name="character" default="young man"} has messy, dark black hair and an athletic build, appearing in various casual outfits like hoodies, t-shirts, and a workout tank top. prompts.title: Advanced Two-Step Prompting Strategy for Nano Banana Pro Thumbnails
prompts.prompt: Actually, there's a trickier way to use this. First, have it systematically summarize the information → Then, based on that, have it create the output/deepen the discussion Just doing this makes the quality of the output completely different. This is because if you first create a blueprint in the AI's mind—including "terminology," "judgment criteria," "prohibited items," "patterns," and "priorities"— The next instructions will be output according to that blueprint, making it less likely to deviate. For example, if you want Nano Banana Pro to create a thumbnail: ① First, ask GPT-5.2: "Thoroughly research and systematize the best practices for creating prompts for YouTube thumbnails using Nano Banana Pro. Include common mistakes as well." ② After that, ask: "Based on the current system, create a prompt for making a YouTube thumbnail on the theme of {argument name="theme" default="XX"} using Nano Banana Pro. The video content is like this, and I want to include {argument name="wording" default="this kind of wording"}." Then, input the completed prompt into Nano Banana Pro. It becomes much easier to get the desired output. If you just ask it to "create" every time, the AI outputs based on the moment, leading to inconsistent results. But if you create a map (system) first, it's powerful. Moreover, this method works for side business strategies, sales copy, and video scripts. The versatility is insane. I highly recommend having the AI organize how to create good output before having it perform the task, and then having it think based on that organization. By the way, the thumbnail created this time is the third image. Since the first attempt was mediocre, I had it systematize how to create attractive YouTube thumbnails before generating the prompt.
prompts.description: This tweet outlines an advanced, two-step prompting strategy to significantly improve the quality of AI output, specifically for generating YouTube thumbnails using Nano Banana Pro. The strategy involves first asking a powerful LLM (like GPT-5.2) to systematically summarize the best practices, terminology, and constraints for creating Nano Banana Pro prompts (creating a 'map'). Then, the user asks the LLM to generate the final, specific prompt based on that established system and the user's requirements, resulting in much more consistent and targeted output.

prompts.title: Emerald Green Fashion Magazine Cover

Below the title, smaller text indicates "JUNE 2026 ISSUE." The central image is a dynamic, full-body photo of model {argument name="model" default="Arden Cho"}, suspended in a powerful, airborne jumping pose with her left leg bent and her right arm on her hip. She has wild, wind-blown black hair, clear, focused eyes (without an eye-band), and is looking directly at the viewer. She wears a new, form-fitting, sleeveless turtlneck crop top in a {argument name="fabric" default="rich emerald-green satin"} fabric, replacing the previous blue top. She is wearing dark-wash denim jeans with the specific denim rose floral belt from the original. A flowing, long, sheer gold fabric scarf-like accessory billows around her head. The background is a clean, creamy paper texture. On the left side, stacked gold serif text reads: 'GOLD STANDARD THE ULTIMATE GUIDE TO LUXURY SHOPPING' and below it, 'COSTUME DRAMA: REDEFINING THE RED CARPET'. prompts.title: Neo-Constructivist Typographic Brand Poster
prompts.prompt: A bold Neo-Constructivist typographic brand advertisement poster for “{argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}”. The composition is a full-bleed, portrait-format graphic design piece that fuses extreme typographic-as-architecture with 2 to 3 iconic hero products of {argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"} embedded directly into the layout. The letters of “{argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}” are massively oversized, fragmented, and cropped at the edges of the frame, functioning as giant abstract geometric building blocks. The letterforms are modular, maze-like, and interlocking — constructed from rounded rectangles, angular channels, and tight negative-space gaps. The entire composition is a strict grid-structured layout divided into rectangular zones. HERO PRODUCTS: 2 to 3 of {argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}’s most iconic, recognizable products are placed within dedicated rectangular grid zones inside the composition. The products are rendered in a flat, high-contrast, graphic illustration style — NOT photographic. They are silhouetted, simplified into bold flat shapes, and colored using only the brand’s official color palette. The products sit inside clearly defined rectangular or square cells within the grid, framed by the surrounding typographic mass. Each product occupies its own zone — one product per cell — with clean hard edges. The products feel architectural and structural, as if they are part of the typographic grid itself, not floating decorations. Examples: for Nike — a side-profile Air Max sneaker silhouette, a jersey, and a sports bag; for Coca-Cola — a glass bottle, a can, and a glass with ice; for Apple — an iPhone, MacBook, and AirPods; for McDonald’s — a burger, fries box, and a drink cup. The products are rendered WITHOUT any background within their cell — just a flat solid brand color fill behind each product silhouette, so they integrate cleanly into the poster’s color system. Product details are reduced to essential bold outlines and flat fill areas — no gradients, no shadows, no photorealism. They should look like vintage product icons or stamp illustrations. Color palette is strictly limited to THREE colors from {argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}’s official brand identity: {argument name="primary color" default="PRIMARY COLOR"} for the dominant typographic mass and letterforms, {argument name="accent color" default="SECONDARY COLOR"} for product silhouettes and the single bold geometric accent shape (a perfect circle or bold stripe), and {argument name="background color" default="BACKGROUND COLOR"} as the deep solid background. All fills are 100% flat. No gradients, no tints, no textures on the products themselves. Somewhere along the left or right vertical edge, the brand name “{argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}” is typeset in large, bold, condensed sans-serif capital letters rotated 90 degrees in the accent color, anchoring the composition as a vertical label. At least one perfect geometric circle in the accent color appears in the upper zone of the composition as a structural element. The overall aesthetic references Soviet Constructivism (Rodchenko, El Lissitzky), 1970s Swiss Internat
prompts.description: A sophisticated prompt for creating bold, Soviet-style constructivist brand posters using architectural typography and flat product silhouettes.

prompts.prompt: [DISH] at the precise moment of a dramatic [LIQUID] pour in ultra high-speed photography, liquid cascade frozen mid-fall in perfect clarity. Hero [DISH] center on matte [COLOR] surface, [LIQUID] pouring from above in one cinematic ribbon catching warm single-source light, splitting and branching into suspended droplets and threads as it hits the surface. prompts.title: Hyper-Real 16K Documentary Shot: The Sun Flickers Off
prompts.prompt: A hyper-real 16K documentary shot capturing the exact moment the Sun flickers—turning off for 0.2 seconds. Show real Earth daylight collapsing into instant, impossible darkness. Streetlights half-ignite in mid-boot, car headlights flare weakly, every shadow in the world disappears at the same exact millisecond, leaving a terrifying flat black nothing. In the next heartbeat, daylight detonates back on—shadows snap violently back into existence like razor-sharp cutouts. Birds freeze mid-flight as if gravity paused; cars halt as if inertia hesitated. The far horizon glows a faint, residual red, like an afterimage burned onto the sky. Use natural global lighting physics, atmospheric scattering, documentary realism, handheld news-camera vibration, micro-grain, zero CGI softness, ultra-sharp lensing, real-world color science, and scientific accuracy. Convey global panic but captured with the calm, unfiltered eye of a live news broadcast. Hyper-real, 16K, macro-cinematic documentary detail.
prompts.description: A highly conceptual and technical prompt requesting a hyper-realistic, 16K documentary-style shot capturing the impossible moment the sun briefly turns off. The prompt demands scientific accuracy in lighting physics, atmospheric scattering, and documentary realism (handheld camera, micro-grain), focusing on the terrifying, instantaneous collapse and violent return of daylight and shadows.

prompts.title: Technical Blueprint of an AI GPU Cluster
prompts.prompt: A detailed technical blueprint of a high-performance AI GPU cluster placed on a polished brass drafting table, with a photorealistic miniature AI server system self-assembling from it — multiple GPU accelerator units (sleek black and metallic modules with neon green accents) rising from the dimension lines, high-speed interconnect bridges threading through the tolerance annotations, and dense compute nodes forming from the grid layout. Stacks of GPU cards slide into server chassis above the parts list, each unit locking in with precision. NVLink-style connectors and high-bandwidth interconnects assemble seamlessly between GPUs, forming a powerful parallel compute network. Rack-mounted AI servers emerge vertically, with layered compute blades building upward in perfect alignment. A liquid cooling system forms from exploded-diagram callouts — transparent cooling pipes with glowing coolant flowing through them, cold plates attaching to GPUs, and radiators assembling with high-performance fans. Heat dissipation fins and airflow channels dynamically shape around the system. A tiny engineer in futuristic protective gear stands on a GPU module inspecting circuits with a holographic diagnostic interface, while another miniature technician connects high-speed data cables into a switch unit. Fiber optic lines glow faintly, representing active data transfer. Functional details illuminate — GPU core lights pulsing softly, status LEDs blinking in synchronized patterns, data streams visualized as glowing lines moving between nodes, and monitoring panels activating during assembly. Signature tools of the trade — precision screwdriver, thermal paste applicator, anti-static tools, fiber connectors, and a digital diagnostic tablet — rest across the blueprint’s title block, partially integrated into the scene. All elements grow organically from the blueprint like a 3D mechanical diorama — circuit traces rising from printed schematics, GPU modules emerging from drawn outlines, cables threading through pencil grid lines. Seamless transformation from 2D blueprint into a fully operational AI infrastructure. LIGHTING: Soft studio lighting combined with strong neon green and cool blue glows from GPUs and data pathways. Subtle reflections from the brass surface and volumetric light enhancing depth. CAMERA & LENS: Shot on a full-frame camera, 35mm lens. Slight low-angle perspective to emphasize scale and power. Cinematic depth of field with focus on central GPU cluster. COMPOSITION: Vertical 2:3 format. Central stacked GPU cluster rising upward with symmetrical balance. Clean negative space around edges with layered depth. STYLE & MOOD: Futuristic, cinematic, high-end AI infrastructure aesthetic inspired by NVIDIA design language. Powerful, clean, and cutting-edge. DETAILS: Ultra-detailed textures — matte black metal, glowing accents, micro circuitry, cooling liquid reflections, cable braiding, LED indicators. 8K resolution, HDR,
prompts.description: A highly detailed prompt for Gemini Nano Banana Pro to generate a futuristic, cinematic image of a technical blueprint transforming into a photorealistic, self-assembling AI GPU cluster on a polished brass drafting table, emphasizing technical details, lighting, and composition.
