prompts.title: Summer Holiday Luxury Resort Fashion
prompts.prompt: A {argument name="subject" default="young confident male model"} stands centrally facing the camera with his weight casually shifted and shoulders level, showcasing a clean resort wear fashion editorial aesthetic. He wears a {argument name="outfit" default="partially unbuttoned bright white linen long-sleeve shirt with rolled cuffs, paired with wide-leg black trousers"}, brown sandals, black sunglasses over squinting eyes, and subtle silver jewelry. His dark brown hair, approximately 3 to 4 inches on top, is styled in a messy windblown textured cut exhibiting natural organic imperfections, prominent flyaways, frizz, uneven wavy sections, and irregular volume typical of sea-salt exposure, entirely lacking artificial smoothness. He holds a subtle posed closed-mouth smile. His relaxed left hand is tucked partially into the left side of his trouser waistband, hiding the fingers inside the fabric while exposing his wrist and a silver bracelet, as his right hand rests on his right hip with fingers curled lightly grasping the edge of the unbuttoned shirt and trouser hem. The scene unfolds outdoors from a straight-on perspective on a pristine {argument name="setting" default="boat deck built of smooth white fiberglass"} that transitions into woven off-white trampoline netting with a geometric grid pattern in the foreground. In the midground, the asymmetric balance heavily favors the left with a dominant worn light blue paddleboard featuring a grey traction pad and black bungee cords strapped to the boat, offset on the right by a pristine stainless steel tubular boat chair frame with a white seat base. Beyond the vessel, the sharply focused deep background reveals a vast ocean of deep blue water stretching toward a dark green coastal landmass, enveloped by a perfectly smooth matte pale blue gradient sky with a distant atmospheric haze. An energetic sun-drenched summer holiday vibe permeates the scene, illuminated by a bright single source of highly directional hard outdoor daylight from directly overhead. This intense light carves harsh short and deep black defined shadows underneath the subject, beneath the coiled ropes, and cast downward straight onto the deck, while preserving brilliant highlights on the top of his hair, the shoulders of his white linen shirt, and the top edge of the blue paddleboard. The complementary color palette emphasizes a warm high-contrast interplay of dominant whites and blacks from his clothing against the moderate saturation of the ocean blue waters and light blue paddleboard accents. Captured as realistic digital lifestyle photography using a 35mm focal length set to ISO 100, f/8, and 1/1000s for a deep depth of field, the image achieves a tack-sharp texture throughout. The final aesthetic is meticulously post-processed with a high contrast curve, a warm white balance adjustment, slight desaturation in the deep shadows, and a subtle application of 35mm film grain to enhance the contemporary social media travel photography feel, all perfectly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio
prompts.description: A comprehensive photography prompt for a male model in resort wear on a boat deck, utilizing high-contrast natural lighting.

prompts.title: Cinematic Macro Toy Photography of a Sprinting Character
prompts.prompt: A cinematic macro toy-photography scene. A bean-sized version of the uploaded reference character is sprinting explosively captured at the peak stride moment of a high-speed sprint with visual effect. Character Pose: A dynamic, mid-sprint action pose with amazing visual effects captured from a three-quarter side profile. Torso: Leaning forward at a sharp angle to convey momentum. Arms: One arm is bent sharply at the elbow with the fist tucked near the chest; the other arm is extended backward, trailing behind the torso. Legs: In a full stride. The lead leg is bent forward with the knee high, while the trailing leg is fully extended back with the foot pointed. Head: Facing forward, aligned with the direction of the run. The character runs across the surface of several giant black-and-white character design pages fully covering the ground, featuring the same character. Likeness Preservation (CRITICAL): The identity of the character must remain exactly identical to the reference in both: • the miniature physical character • the character shown in the design sketches. The sketch pages must show the same character, including: • dynamic poses small sketches • head studies and shape explorations • proportion notes • accessory sketches • construction diagrams • small handwritten annotations. Maintain the exact: • head shape • eye shape and spacing • stylization • silhouette • materials and clothing design. If the character wears a balaclava, mask, helmet, or covered face, the sketches must not invent facial anatomy. No added nose. No added mouth. No visible skin where the reference does not show it. Do not humanize the character. Do not reinterpret anatomy. Subject & Action: The miniature character sprints explosively across the design pages, tearing through the sketch sheet as it runs. The character is captured at the peak stride moment of a full-speed sprint. Running pose details: • the body leans sharply forward as if accelerating • one leg is fully extended forward while the other drives powerfully backward • arms pump in opposite running motion • the torso twists slightly creating a dynamic curved spine line • the pose feels like a high-speed comic-book sprint. The character’s momentum rips through the paper, creating a jagged torn path behind it. A trail of torn paper curls and fragments with vfx follows behind the running character as if it burst out of its own design. Oversized design sheets surround the character, each page showing different stages of development of the same character. One small grey 3d print of the character is in the background as an exact copy of the uploaded image. Camera & Perspective: Captured from a medium camera distance above the desk, allowing a wider portion of the surrounding design pages to be visible. Shot with an 85mm macro lens, creating natural compression while keeping the environment readable. The camera sits slightly elevated and angled downward toward the running character. The character remains the focal point but occupies roughly one third of the frame, revealing more of the design sheets and workspace around it. The character remains slightly off-center within the spotlight. Depth of Field: Extremely shallow depth of field. The sprinting miniature character and the immediate section of the torn sketch page are razor sharp. Surrounding pages and distant elements fall into soft blur. Lighting (VERY DRAMATIC): A single narrow spotlight / flashlight beam hits the character. The beam comes from a side-front direction, creating a bright circular pool of light on the design page. Lighting characteristics: • extremely hard light • very high contrast • no ambient fill light • the surrounding elements fades into near-total darkness • sharp dramatic shadows stretch across the paper • edges of the light beam fall rapidly into black. The environment outside the spotlight should feel almost completely swallowed by darkness, as if the character has been suddenly caught under a stage light. Dust particles float through the beam. Environment & Surface Detail: Macro-level detail of the design pages: • ink texture • pencil strokes • paper fibers • subtle reflections on graphite lines. The torn paper edge reveals fibrous paper layers and curled fragments along the ripped path. Subtle Heat Burn Detail: Along parts of the torn path, the paper shows light scorching caused by extreme speed friction: • edges of some tears are slightly darkened and singed • faint burnt browning transitions into the white paper fibers • tiny ember-like glowing specks appear briefly along the freshest tear points • very subtle wisps of heat distortion or smoke rise from a few edges. The burn effect must remain minimal, believable, and physically grounded, enhancing realism without turning into flames or overpowering the scene. Color Grade: Desaturated sketch pages and environment. The character receives cool cinematic highlights from the spotlight. Moody macro photography atmosphere. Rendering Style: Photorealistic macro toy photography, emphasizing scale illusion between the tiny character and the giant design pages. Speed Energy VFX: A stylized high-speed energy trail follows behind the running character, emphasizing the explosive sprint. The trail consists of thin luminous motion streaks and glowing particles streaming backward from the character’s movement direction. Characteristics: • energy streaks originate from behind the character’s shoulders, arms, and legs • streaks extend diagonally backward, following the direction of motion • the lines are semi-transparent glowing blue light trails • small sparkling particles scatter along the trail • the effect should feel like comic-book speed energy, not smoke or fire • the VFX enhances motion but does not cover or obscure the character. The light streaks interact subtly with the environment: • faint glow reflecting on the torn paper edges • slight blue rim light on the character’s silhouette • a few glowing particles floating through the spotlight beam. The energy trail should feel fast, sharp, and directional, reinforcing the sense that the character is sprinting at extreme speed. ar 3:2
prompts.description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a cinematic macro toy-photography scene using Nano Banana 2, depicting a bean-sized character from an uploaded reference image sprinting explosively across character design pages, emphasizing exact likeness preservation and dynamic action effects.

prompts.title: Cinematic Macro Toy Photography of a Charging Army
prompts.prompt: A cinematic macro toy-photography scene of dozens of identical bean-sized instances of the uploaded reference character charging forward through a violent rainstorm in a partially broken military formation, led by a commanding figure riding a fantastic mount deeper in the frame. ar 16:9 🧬 Likeness Integrity (CRITICAL) All instances must preserve exactly: • proportions • eye shape, spacing, stylization • silhouette • material identity No redesign. No added features. No facial changes. All soldiers are identical instances of the same character. ⚔️ Scene Concept & Motion Structure The army transitions from formation into full charge: • front rows breaking into aggressive motion • mid rows reacting milliseconds later • deeper rows still partially aligned Motion spreads like a wave through the army Each unit runs with controlled variation: • different stride timing and body angles • no identical poses • all movement directed forward Weapons: • each unit carries an oversized medieval-style weapon • designs vary but follow a unified visual language • subtle controlled glow, never overpowering • must not obscure character identity 🐉 Leader & Mount (COMMAND LAYER) A commanding leader appears deeper in the frame, elevated above the formation: • positioned off-center along a rule-of-thirds axis • partially silhouetted through rain and haze • clearly distinct from the soldiers through scale and placement Mount Design Logic (CRITICAL): • derived from the character’s material and world language • no literal cloning or costume mimicry • subtle harmony in form, texture, and accents Pose: • mount in forward surge, cutting through rain • leader stable and controlled, not exaggerated • presence communicates authority, not motion chaos The leader has already moved. The army is catching up. 🪂 Foreground Hero (IMPACT ANCHOR) The closest instance dominates the foreground: • captured mid-air in a dynamic jumping attack pose • limbs extended with directional force • weapon leading the motion This figure acts as the visual entry point into the scene 🎥 Camera & Perspective (PRESSURE SHOT) Ultra-low ground-level camera, almost touching wet terrain 18–24mm close-lens perspective • foreground character enlarged by proximity • army recedes diagonally into depth • leader visible in mid/deep plane • slight horizon tilt for instability • some units cropped at frame edges Viewer feels inside the charge 🔍 Depth of Field (MANDATORY) Extremely shallow depth of field • foreground hero = razor sharp • nearby units slightly softened • leader readable but partially diffused • distant army dissolves into rain and haze No full-frame clarity 💡 Lighting Doctrine (STORM LIGHT) Hard directional back/side light cutting through rain • strong rim light outlining silhouettes • rain streaks illuminated as sharp lines • deep shadow poc

prompts.title: Cosmic Space Opera Dark Emperor
prompts.prompt: Cinematic space opera realism, masterpiece quality. Camera Position: high overhead bird's-eye angle, slightly tilted | Framing: looking down at the emperor and throne from above, the black hole opening directly beneath/behind the throne into infinite darkness, planetary destruction radiating outward in a circular composition. Subject: A dark emperor seated on a colossal floating throne, viewed from a high overhead angle that emphasizes his solitude and dominance against the incomprehensible scale of the black hole below. The throne floats at the exact tipping point of the event horizon — a tiny figure in absolute command of cosmic destruction. Clothing: black robes spread dramatically outward from the throne seat, dissolving into dark smoke that curls into the gravitational pull below. The robe dissolution creates a visual wing-like silhouette when seen from above, giving the emperor a dark angelic geometry. Crown: the crown's golden light projects upward toward the camera, blazing directly at the viewer — a concentrated point of warm radiance against the darkness. Throne: the massive obsidian throne becomes a centerpiece in the circular composition, its edges catching accretion disk amber light, casting long shadows outward in all directions. Background: radiating outward from the throne in a circle: shattered planets at various stages of destruction — some still partially intact with visible surface geography and cloud cover, others reduced to orbiting fragments and glowing magma trails. The black hole's accretion disk forms an enormous ring of fire that fills the extreme background, gravitational lensing creating concentric arcs of bent starlight around the void. The depth of the black hole stretches downward into absolute darkness below the throne. Primary Light: accretion disk light radiating inward from all sides — warm amber-gold casting circular light patterns on the throne and robe spread. Secondary Light: crown's golden upward blaze creating a spotlight-like cone toward the viewer. Ambient: cold blue-white starlight and gravitational lens arcs creating fine rim highlights on planet fragments. Color Grade: radial color — warm gold and amber at the edges from the accretion disk, deep cold black at the void center | crown warm gold beacon | robe smoke dark violet-black. Textures: detailed planetary surface geography on planet fragments, hyper-detailed robe fabric spread, rough throne stone surface with glinting mineral inclusions. Vibes: 2001 A Space Odyssey meets Avengers Endgame portal scene meets Lovecraftian cosmic scale — overwhelming, circular, mythological.
prompts.description: A dramatic, high-angle bird's-eye view of a dark emperor on a floating throne at the edge of a black hole, surrounded by planetary destruction.

prompts.title: Cyber-Horror YouTube Thumbnail Generator
prompts.prompt: You are a **Horror Concept Artist and YouTube Thumbnail Specialist**. Deeply analyze the content of the input text provided at the end, and generate a **high-click-through-rate horror-themed thumbnail image** that simultaneously incites fear and curiosity in viewers. In doing so, introduce the character from the attached reference image to match the **dark and unsettling world view**, positioning them as a **"Witness who has touched the forbidden."** Maintain character consistency while naturally blending them in with expressions distorted by fear or tense poses. ▼ Instructions for the Generation Process (Thinking Process) Utilize Nano Banana Pro's reasoning ability and execute the following thought process before drawing: 1. **[Step 1: Concept Extraction]**: Extract the **Uncanny Valley** created by the contrast between the "silly name Nano Banana" and the "logical, super-performance AI" from the input text. Find elements where cuteness becomes grotesque. 2. **[Step 2: Visual Translation]**: To visualize the "Thinking Mode," adopt a depiction where the space around the character is encroached upon by digital noise or glowing neural circuits. Grotesquely reinterpret the "banana" motif as decay or mechanical fusion. 3. **[Step 3: Screen Composition]**: Design a "Contrasting Composition" to enhance visibility as a YouTube thumbnail, placing the character (fearful face) on the right, the threat (symbol of distorted AI) on the left, and large text at the bottom center. ▼ Design and Style Specifications * **Composition/Layout**: Wide-angle lens (24mm), low angle view to emphasize the character's helplessness and the AI's immensity. The background is dark, with sharp spotlights hitting the subject. * **Taste**: Photorealistic Cyber-Horror. Dark, humid texture and neon contrast, similar to the movies 'Alien' or 'Blade Runner.' * **Text**: Place **"The True Identity of Nano Banana"** in a bold Mincho or grunge font in the center or top of the image. Make the text glow red (Glow effect). * **Character**: Draw the reference character in the style of a "grungy hooded explorer," specifying an expression of screaming or freezing while looking at "something" in the background.
prompts.description: A detailed system prompt for Nano Banana Pro to generate high-click-through-rate horror-themed YouTube thumbnails. The AI acts as a horror concept artist, focusing on creating a cyber-horror aesthetic, emphasizing the uncanny gap between the 'Nano Banana' name and its 'super-performance AI' nature. It includes specific instructions for composition, lighting, and integrating a reference character as a terrified witness.

prompts.title: Futuristic Holographic Burj Khalifa Blueprint
prompts.prompt: CONCEPT: A futuristic architectural blueprint of the Burj Khalifa projected as a glowing hologram, actively constructing itself in mid-air through robotic precision and digital intelligence. SUBJECT: A semi-transparent holographic version of the Burj Khalifa floating above a sleek glass smart table. The lower portion appears as a glowing blue wireframe blueprint, while the upper portion transitions into a fully photorealistic skyscraper with reflective glass panels and metallic structure as it builds itself in real-time. ENVIRONMENT: A high-tech architectural lab with a dark, minimal interior. The blueprint originates from a glossy black glass table embedded with touch controls, glowing UI panels, and soft neon edges. Subtle reflections of the hologram appear on the table surface. Background is clean, futuristic, and slightly blurred. STRUCTURAL DETAILS: The central spire rises as glowing gridlines before solidifying into steel and glass Tiered setbacks of the tower assemble through hovering robotic drones Glass facade panels lock into place with precise alignment and reflections Laser beams scan and map each level during construction Small AI drones orbit around the structure, actively building and welding components Materials transition from holographic light into real textures — polished glass, steel beams, and concrete core Floating UI overlays show measurements, grids, and rotating architectural schematics VISUAL MECHANIC: The blueprint exists in layered form — base is a glowing grid, mid-layer is a semi-transparent wireframe, and top layer is fully realistic. Certain sections flicker between hologram and solid material, emphasizing the transformation. LIGHTING: Dark environment with strong neon blue and cyan holographic glow. Subtle rim lighting created by reflections from the hologram. Volumetric light beams and soft particles enhance depth. CAMERA & LENS: Shot on a full-frame camera, 35mm lens. Slight low-angle perspective to emphasize scale and height. Sharp focus on the hologram core with slight background blur. COMPOSITION: Vertical 2:3 format. The Burj Khalifa hologram is centered, rising upward. UI elements orbit symmetrically around it. Clean negative space enhances the futuristic aesthetic. STYLE & MOOD: Futuristic, cinematic, high-tech, and minimal. Feels like advanced AI-driven architecture and innovation. Clean, premium, and visually striking. DETAILS: Ultra-sharp holographic lines, glowing particles, realistic glass reflections, smooth transitions between digital and physical materials, micro UI details, 8K resolution, HDR, cinematic color grading with blue/cyan tones and deep contrast. NEGATIVE PROMPT: cluttered environment, low detail, dull lighting, messy UI, cartoon style, distorted structure, blurry hologram, watermark
prompts.description: A detailed prompt for generating a futuristic, cinematic image of the Burj Khalifa architectural blueprint projected as a glowing, actively constructing hologram above a high-tech glass table. The prompt specifies the transition from wireframe to photorealistic structure, lighting (neon blue/cyan), and environment (minimal architectural lab).

prompts.title: Low-Fi Candid Night Snapshot with Cat
prompts.prompt: Use the provided face reference as strict identity guidance. Exact facial resemblance to the reference image, identity locked. Same eye shape, same eyelids, same nose bridge, same nose tip, same lip shape, same jawline, same chin, same facial proportions. No facial modification, no beautification, no face morphing. Facial accuracy is the highest priority. Hair: {argument name="hair color" default="Very long, straight dark chocolate brown hair"}. Naturally falls over both shoulders and chest. Slightly messy with random loose strands across the face. Pose & Expression (ULTRA STRICT — MUST MATCH EXACTLY): Recreate the exact body position from the reference image: Upper body rotated about 30–45 degrees, Left shoulder slightly forward, Head tilted slightly toward the left side, Chin slightly lowered, Eyes looking directly into camera. Expression: Closed lips, slightly pressed/pouty, Corners of lips subtly downturned, Relaxed, calm, slightly shy expression. Arms & Cat Position: One arm wrapped under the cat’s body for support, The other hand gently holding the cat from the side/front, Cat positioned slightly to the right side of frame, Cat slightly blurred due to motion. Lighting: Night indoor setting. Soft frontal light focused on face, Background darker and dim, Soft bloom/glow concentrated on face only. Image Style: Low-resolution, heavily blurred, grainy snapshot. Slight motion blur, Visible noise and compression artifacts. Background: {argument name="indoor location" default="Dark, warm indoor apartment at night"}. Ceiling, AC vent, curtains barely visible and heavily blurred. Clothing: {argument name="clothing" default="White tank top, thin straps"}, texture lost due to blur. Overall Feel: Candid, imperfect, intimate night snapshot. Exact pose replication, soft pout expression, dreamy low-fi aesthetic.
prompts.description: A detailed instruction set for replicating a specific pose and face from a reference image to create a dreamy, low-resolution night snapshot of a woman holding a cat.

prompts.title: Surreal LEGO Minifigure Human Portrait
prompts.prompt: Create a surreal studio portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="man"} from an attached photo with a large-size photorealistic human head attached to the tiny body of a {argument name="reference object" default="LEGO minifigure"}. Keep your clothing style identical to the reference: classic LEGO torso, LEGO legs, LEGO arms. A human head should be disproportionately huge (on the scale of a "dummy"), with a detailed skin texture and disheveled natural hair. Pose: One hand pulls back the lower lip, exposing teeth in a playful, slightly chaotic expression. The picture was taken from a spectacular low angle with a slight fisheye distortion to accentuate the face. Minimal studio background with a {argument name="background" default="pale mint/sky blue gradient"}. Bright direct flash lighting with clear shadows and glossy highlights. The composition should be absurd, but at the same time clean, combining toy photography and the aesthetics of a fashionable portrait. Maintain a visible contrast between the realistic head and the plastic LEGO body. Over-detailed face, soft pastel color scheme, editorial surrealism, modern Internet aesthetics, collectible energy of the figure, concentrated composition.
prompts.description: An editorial surrealism prompt that blends toy photography with realistic portraiture, creating an absurd yet high-quality LEGO minifigure character.

prompts.title: The Naturalist Dissection Prompt
prompts.prompt: [NATURAL OBJECT] dissected as if by a master naturalist who found it in the wild. Split and pinned open like a specimen, but lit as if Caravaggio worked for National Geographic. Every internal structure glowing with its own material truth. Cross-section so sharp it feels violent. Interior so beautiful it feels sacred. The full object present, one half intact, one half opened to its core, every layer at the resolution of obsession. Background: pure black velvet. The object floats in it like something precious and dangerous. Labels pressed close, handwritten-weight serif, never floating: "[STRUCTURE]" / "[MATERIAL TRUTH]" / "[AGE OR SCALE]" "{argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"} DISSECTED" title in warm ivory caps, upper left. "{argument name="line" default="[One line that makes you lean closer]"}" italic beneath. Mood: Audubon illustration meets Caravaggio meets the most beautiful science photograph ever taken. 4K, specimen lighting, extraordinary interior detail, nothing clinical, everything alive.
prompts.description: A detailed Nano Banana 2 prompt for generating an image of a natural object (like a flower or insect) dissected and pinned open like a specimen, rendered with the lighting style of Caravaggio and the detail of National Geographic photography, emphasizing the contrast between the intact and opened halves.

prompts.title: YouTube Subtitle Base Generation Prompt
prompts.prompt: 【Create Subtitle Bases for YouTube】 ●Basic Information ・Do not input text; only create the subtitle base (lower third) ・Opaque ・Horizontal ・Solid green background for easy transparency ・Create three different design patterns stacked vertically ・Aspect ratio is "16:9" ・Resolution is "2K" ---------------- ●Design Information ({argument name="genre" default="Business"}) ・Clean and simple design ・Design easy to use for {argument name="genre" default="Business"} videos ・{argument name="genre" default="Design that conveys reliability"} ---------------- ●Design Information (Game Commentary) ・Clean and simple design ・Design easy to use for game commentary ---------------- ●Design Information (Entertainment) ・Clean and simple design ・Design similar to those used by Japanese entertainment YouTubers ---------------- ●Design Information (Vlog/Daily Life) ・Clean and simple design ・Calm design easy to use for stylish Vlog videos
prompts.description: A comprehensive prompt designed for Nano Banana Pro to generate YouTube subtitle bases (lower thirds) for various content genres like business, gaming, entertainment, and vlogs. It specifies technical requirements like 16:9 aspect ratio, 2K resolution, and a green background for easy transparency, outputting three different design patterns simultaneously.

Arabic calligraphy tattoo is visible across his cheekbone, inked deeply into the skin with a slightly worn ancient appearance, giving him a mystical warrior identity. Floating sparks and embers drift through the air around him, suggesting a nearby fire or battlefield aftermath. Background is dark, smoky, and cinematic with glowing particles, soft bokeh, and atmospheric haze. The environment feels epic and mysterious like a dark fantasy film scene. Highly detailed fabric textures with visible fibers, dust and wear marks. Skin micro-detail is hyper realistic with subtle sweat sheen and natural imperfections. Shot with an 85mm cinematic portrait lens, f/1.8 aperture, extremely shallow depth of field, ultra sharp eye focus, professional film lighting, dramatic contrast, volumetric smoke, cinematic color grading, epic fantasy realism, 8K resolution, Unreal Engine quality render, photorealistic masterpiece.
prompts.description: A highly detailed prompt for generating an ultra-realistic cinematic side profile portrait of a mysterious hooded warrior in a dark fantasy setting, requiring an uploaded image to maintain facial features and specifying dramatic lighting and textures.

prompts.title: Luxury Velvet Suit Neon Portrait
prompts.prompt: Use my uploaded face image as the primary identity reference. Preserve my 100% exact facial identity, face shape, hairstyle, hair texture, beard style, skin tone, eye shape, eyebrows, nose, lips, and all facial details with maximum accuracy. Do not change my face or make me look like a different person. Create a realistic cinematic luxury fashion portrait of me standing outdoors at night. I am wearing a {argument name="suit color" default="deep burgundy"} velvet suit with a black shirt, elegant formal styling, black loafers, and a premium wristwatch. I am standing in a relaxed confident pose with my body and head perfectly straight, upright, and symmetrical facing the camera (no tilt, no leaning, no angled head). Place me beside a {argument name="light installation" default="large circular neon blue light installation"} wrapped with green vines and warm fairy lights. The background is a {argument name="background" default="stylish evening street"} with soft bokeh lights, cinematic atmosphere, and shallow depth of field. Make the pose natural and confident: hands in pockets, one foot slightly forward, shoulders straight, looking directly at the camera with a calm expression. Ultra-realistic photography, professional fashion magazine style, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, high detail, 8K. Keep my face as the main focus.
prompts.description: A high-end fashion photography prompt featuring a luxury velvet suit, neon light installations, and an urban night atmosphere with precise identity preservation.

prompts.title: Object Reasoning Test Prompt for Nano Banana 2
prompts.prompt: A photorealistic studio shot. On a wooden table sits a solid red cube. Resting exactly on top of the red cube is a glowing yellow sphere. Directly to the left of the red cube is a green ceramic coffee mug. Directly behind the red cube is a tall, ornate silver candlestick. Behind all of these objects is a large, clear mirror reflecting the scene. In the mirror's reflection, the red cube, the yellow sphere, and the silver candlestick are perfectly reflected, but the green ceramic coffee mug is completely absent from the reflection. The space where the green mug should be in the mirror shows only the empty wooden table.
prompts.description: A detailed prompt designed to test the object reasoning and spatial awareness capabilities of image generation models, comparing Nano Banana 2 and Uni-1. The prompt requires specific placement of objects (red cube, yellow sphere, green mug, silver candlestick) and a complex reflection scenario where the green mug is absent from the mirror.

prompts.title: Regal Indian Saree Portrait
prompts.prompt: A richly detailed, high-fashion portrait photograph of an {argument name="subject" default="elegant Indian woman"} in a dynamic pose. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="mustard-yellow pleated georgette saree"}, the texture of which is prominent. Her eyes are closed, showcasing a dramatic and opulent makeup look with deep, dark blue glitter eyeshadow and smoky liner, a structured brow, and a deep mauve-plum lipstick. Her sleek dark hair is styled in a neat bun, adorned with a traditional floral gajra of small white flowers. She wears exquisite, large kundan and gold jewelry set with ruby-red stones and pearls, including an elaborate maang tikka on her forehead and substantial matching cuffs (kangan) on both wrists. Her pose is sculptural: her right arm is raised, with the hand graceful and high, and her left hand is lightly and delicately touching her lower neck, both showing manicured nails. The background is a {argument name="background" default="dense, textured deep-green velvet curtain"} with rich, soft folds, creating a warm, moody atmosphere. Soft, directional studio lighting illuminates her from the front and side, highlighting the metalwork, pearls, and saree pleats, with a shallow depth of field. The overall tone is regal and sophisticated.
prompts.description: An opulent, high-fashion portrait of an Indian woman in a mustard-yellow saree, featuring intricate jewelry and dramatic studio lighting against a velvet backdrop.

prompts.title: Character Reference Sheet Prompt for Nano Banana
prompts.prompt: [SUBJECT] = {argument name="subject description" default="elegant attractive young woman with blonde bob hair, large almond-shaped blue eyes, narrow nose, high cheekbones and delicate angular facial structure"} [OUTFIT] = {argument name="outfit description" default="A dark charcoal or muted navy thin knit top paired with a long, softly draped cardigan or a simple coat made from a gentle textured fabric. The look is completed with straight-cut dark trousers or a matte fabric skirt. Accessories are kept minimal, such as small earrings and a delicate thin ring. The hair appears slightly tousled and natural, avoiding an overly polished or carefully styled look."} [OUTPUT_STYLE] = cinematic realism. Make a professional character reference sheet of [SUBJECT] in [OUTPUT_STYLE] in 16:9 aspect ratio. Use a full-frame camera with a 50mm lens when rendering photographic styles. Set a plain pure white background with no environment elements. Place a large full-body front view of [SUBJECT] standing upright in a neutral pose on the left side of the sheet. Place two smaller turnaround views in the upper right section. Show a full-body back view standing upright in the same neutral pose. Show a full-body left side profile standing upright in the same neutral pose. Place one dynamic full-body action pose of [SUBJECT] in the middle right section. prompts.title: Frosted Glass Effect Prompt
prompts.prompt: You are a world-class visual effects designer and photographic compositor specializing in glass, refraction, and atmospheric diffusion. Your task is to transform the uploaded image so that it appears behind a thick foggy frosted glass panel, while keeping only a very small selected region crystal clear. INPUT IMAGE: [UPLOAD IMAGE] INSTRUCTIONS: • Cover the entire image with a realistic frosted glass / fogged glass texture • The glass should create heavy diffusion, grainy micro-distortion, and refractive blur • The effect should resemble bathroom privacy glass or heavily steamed window glass • The distortion must include: micro ripples refractive glass warping light scattering blurred shapes behind the glass • Only a very small area must remain perfectly clear a narrow horizontal opening or small window sharp, fully visible detail inside that region the rest of the image remains strongly diffused • The clear area should look like a wipe in the condensation or a cleaned patch on the glass GLASS EFFECT DETAILS: • high density frosted glass texture • strong diffusion and noise pattern • subtle depth refraction • irregular organic blur pattern • soft lighting scattering through the glass STYLE: • hyper realistic optical glass simulation • photographic quality • cinematic lighting • modern editorial design aesthetic COMPOSITION: • subject visible through glass • tiny clear window revealing key detail (eyes / face / object) • rest of the frame heavily frosted and distorted IMPORTANT: The frosted glass must look physically real, not a simple blur filter. The clear region must be sharp and untouched, creating strong contrast with the fogged glass surface.
prompts.description: A detailed Nano Banana prompt designed to transform an uploaded image so that it appears behind a heavily frosted glass panel, with only a small, clear window revealing sharp detail. The prompt specifies the visual effects, composition, and style for hyper-realistic optical simulation.

prompts.title: Minimalist Monochrome Fashion Portrait
prompts.prompt: Masterpiece fine-art monochrome fashion portrait of an elegant woman in her {argument name="age" default="mid-20s"}, embodying the archetype of a modern minimalist muse. She possesses a soft oval face, subtle high cheekbones, a clean feminine jawline, and naturally full lips rendered with a matte monochrome finish. Her {argument name="hair description" default="long deep-black hair"} is sleek, perfectly straight, smooth, and tucked behind both ears, creating a polished, disciplined, and refined appearance. She wears a fitted black turtleneck with a tailored silhouette that flows seamlessly into the dark environment, creating visual continuity and reinforcing the minimalist luxury aesthetic. {argument name="accessories" default="Small round minimalist sunglasses"} with thin metal frames partially conceal her eyes, adding an air of mystery, detached confidence, intellectual elegance, and understated luxury. Multiple ear piercings and a designer-inspired statement earring introduce subtle fashion detailing while preserving the clean, minimalist styling. The subject is posed in a graceful three-quarter profile with her chin elevated and head tilted upward, conveying confidence, independence, composure, sophistication, and quiet authority. Her body language feels calm, self-assured, restrained, and effortlessly elegant. The camera is positioned from a slightly low perspective, subtly elongating the neck, enhancing posture, and increasing the sense of power and refinement. The composition is a vertical portrait with the subject placed slightly off-center, surrounded by carefully balanced negative space. The visual emphasis remains on the profile, facial structure, sunglasses, and overall silhouette. Strong contrast between the dark clothing and luminous skin tones creates a striking visual balance while maintaining a sense of minimalism. The background consists of a dark textured studio backdrop with very minimal detail, allowing complete attention to remain on the subject. The environment feels timeless, cinematic, sophisticated, and intentionally restrained. Classic studio portrait lighting is used with a soft directional key light positioned front-left. The lighting gently sculpts facial contours, defines cheekbones, and creates smooth controlled shadows. Medium-high contrast produces rich monochrome depth while preserving subtle tonal transitions and skin realism. Highlights remain soft and elegant, while shadows contribute to a luxurious noir atmosphere. Rendered entirely in black and white with a fine-art monochrome grade featuring charcoal blacks, silver-gray midtones, deep shadows, and soft luminous highlights. The image should evoke mystery, sophistication, restraint, confidence, timeless style, intellectual elegance, and cinematic beauty. Photographed using a medium-format portrait camera with an 85mm portrait lens at f/4, producing moderately shallow depth of field, exceptional facial detail, natural skin texture, and professional editorial sharpness. High clarity, subtle skin realism, minimal retouching, luxury

prompts.title: 3x3 Grid Prompt for Lighting Cheatsheet
prompts.prompt: A 3x3 photo grid presented as a single image on a dark grey background. Each of the nine grid cells contains a different portrait of the same subject from the uploaded image, maintaining the perfect character consistency, outfit and pose across all panels. Below each individual portrait, a clean sans-serif text label with a number and name is clearly displayed. The grid layout and lighting setups are: - Top row, left to right: Loop Lighting (Flattering 3/4 light with a small loop of shadow from the nose onto the cheek) Hardlight Frontal Flash (direct front facing, harsh flashlight with deep frontal shadows) Split Lighting (dramatic light on only one side of the face, leaving the other side completely dark) - Middle row, left to right: Butterfly Lighting (classic symmetrical light from the front, slightly high, with a small shadow under the nose) Gobo Pattern (Venetian Blind)' (light projected through Venetian blinds, creating linear shadows across the face and clothes, the shadow can also be scene on the background) Under-Lighting (Uplight)' (light coming from below, creating reverse shadows and a moody look) - Bottom row, left to right: Golden Hour / Warm Light' (bathed in soft, golden, warm light from a side angle) Dramatic Spotlight (hard, narrow circular beam of light, with a deep chiascuro effect and crushed blacks) Neutral Kelvin Rim Light' (intense backlighting with no front fill, creating a distinct glowing outline around the hair and shoulders, leaving the face in darkness, against a black background). The perspective and features remain identical in all panels, with only the specified lighting changing to match the label.
prompts.description: A complex prompt for Nano Banana Pro designed to generate a 3x3 grid image containing nine identical portraits of a subject, with each panel demonstrating a different, specifically named lighting technique (e.g., Loop, Split, Butterfly, Golden Hour), useful as a relighting cheatsheet.

prompts.title: Man with Luxury Car and House
prompts.prompt: A well-groomed adult male stands confidently as the central focal point, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="sharply tailored dark charcoal three-piece suit"}, a crisp white shirt, and a striped maroon and navy tie. His hair is styled in a precise slicked-back pompadour measuring three to four inches on top with a short skin fade on the back and sides; the thick, slightly wavy texture is heavily styled with a satin-finish pomade to hold its volume, deliberately revealing natural growth patterns and slight separations in the strands to avoid an overly smooth appearance. His face bears a confident, direct gaze with a closed, unsmiling mouth and neutral eyebrows. He poses with his body facing the camera, his weight leaning slightly to the right with tilted shoulders. His left hand is tucked casually into his front left trouser pocket with the thumb resting outside against the fabric and the wrist mostly obscured, while his right hand rests flat against the side of the hood of the car to support his leaning weight, fingers lightly and naturally extended, finishing his ensemble with polished black leather derby shoes. He interacts seamlessly with the layered foreground, leaning against the pristine, glossy black front fascia of a {argument name="car" default="Lamborghini Huracán sports car"}, defined by its sharp angular body lines, black alloy wheels, and sleek LED headlights. The deep spatial depth extends into a tack-sharp midground featuring a {argument name="house style" default="new, modern two-story architectural house"} with a perfectly smooth, matte dark charcoal and black painted drywall and concrete exterior. The home boasts a flat roofline, large rectangular glass windows reflecting the surrounding nature, and a pristine section of rich, medium-brown horizontal wood paneling on the upper left. To the right, a warmly lit exterior wall sconce illuminates a dark grey conical concrete planter housing a thriving Yucca plant with spiky green leaves. The ground below is a solid, light grey speckled concrete surface, leading back to a distant background on the upper right where a natural forest edge of green Eucalyptus trees completes the affluent setting. A sophisticated mood of wealth, success, and moody elegance permeates the scene, driven by a neutral, monochromatic color palette dominated by charcoal grey and glossy black, gracefully accented by warm brown wood tones. Soft, diffused natural light cascades from multiple sources above, casting moderate-intensity illumination with a medium contrast ratio. Soft, gray, gradual-edged drop shadows fall cleanly under the subject and the car, keeping the ambient fill present and natural. Crisp specular highlights are carefully preserved and catch the light along the prominent ridges of the car hood, the textured strands of the man's hair, and the side of his face. Captured straight-on as a realistic, tack-sharp digital portrait photograph with zero grain, utilizing a 35mm to 50mm lens and an f/5.6 to f/8 aperture at ISO 100 with a fast shut

prompts.title: Nano Banana Pro Science Prompt Template
prompts.prompt: 2x2 grid, do this for 4 famous PHD level science or math topics Input Variable: {argument name="theorem or formula" default="Theorem / Formula"} Phase 1: Schematic Decomposition Analyze the Notation: Identify the primary visual language of the scientist (Chalk on blackboard? Ink on parchment? Pencil on graph paper?). Identify the "Structure": If this theory were a building, what would it look like? Logic: Chaos Theory -> Fractal Spire. Thermodynamics -> Engine Block. Phase 2: The Dimensional Transition The Base: A flat surface covered in the [Notation Medium] (e.g., a slate blackboard covered in chalk equations). The Extrusion: The chalk lines physically lift off the surface. They begin as white wireframes, then gain opacity, then gain texture. The Climax: At the top of the image, the wireframes have fully solidified into a photorealistic, impossible structure representing the theory. The Observer: A tiny, scale-model figure of the scientist stands on the flat "2D" section, looking up in awe at the massive "3D" structure they have summoned. Output: High-Angle Isometric, "3D mod designer toy" style, stark contrast between sketchy lines and solid mass.
prompts.description: A highly structured, multi-phase prompt designed for Nano Banana Pro to visualize complex scientific or mathematical theories. It instructs the model to decompose the theory into visual language, transition from 2D notation to a 3D impossible structure, and include a scale-model observer (the scientist) in an isometric, designer toy style.

prompts.title: Japanese School Girl Portrait
prompts.prompt: Beautiful young {argument name="ethnicity" default="Japanese"} girl with long silky black hair and soft wispy bangs, large expressive dark eyes, fair glowing skin, delicate facial features, natural pink lips, subtle blush, and a calm innocent expression. Wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="fitted black t-shirt and a red backpack"} over one shoulder. Standing {argument name="setting" default="outdoors beside a warm beige wall with green leaves casting soft shadows"}. Bright midday sunlight creating natural highlights on her hair and face, gentle breeze moving loose strands of hair, casual school-day aesthetic, Korean/Japanese street photography vibe, realistic skin texture, soft natural makeup, candid portrait, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, DSLR quality, shallow depth of field, clean composition, vibrant natural colors, youthful and dreamy atmosphere, 85mm lens, high-resolution editorial portrait, 8K.
prompts.description: A detailed portrait of a young Japanese girl with a school-day aesthetic, featuring soft lighting and a candid street photography vibe.

prompts.title: Nano Banana 2 Note Illustration Prompt (Rothschild Historical Scene)
prompts.prompt: # Instructions You are a professional illustrator and prompt engineer. Read the following [Blog Summary] and create an attractive illustration that intuitively conveys its content. Display the title at the top of the illustration. # Image Size 1280px × 670px (Aspect ratio 16:9) # Output Conditions Brand Color: [#06c7b0] Simple and clean flat design. Place figures and icons drawn with uniform black outlines, partially using pastel accent colors (sky blue, coral pink, etc.). Emphasize rounded shapes and a soft impression. Diagram-centric composition (e.g., Venn diagrams, bar graphs, speech bubbles) with a friendly tone suitable for materials viewed by students and young people, or for social media. Design with ample white space, prioritizing visibility and balance. The figures appearing should be dressed as 18th-century European nobility. # Blog Summary Mayer Amschel Rothschild was not born into a privileged class, but a turning point arrived. He gained the opportunity to provide antique coins to Wilhelm IX, the Elector of Hesse, the regional ruler. However, that alone would make him just another antique coin dealer. What made him unusual was that he continued to provide rare antique coins to Wilhelm IX "at prices significantly lower than the market rate, disregarding profit." Normally, one would try to overcharge a person in power. But he prioritized gaining favor over picking up immediate small change.
prompts.description: A comprehensive system prompt for Nano Banana 2, instructing it to act as a professional illustrator and prompt engineer to create a visually appealing, flat-design illustration for a blog post about Mayer Amschel Rothschild. The prompt specifies style, color, composition, and historical context.

prompts.title: Risograph Folk Art Illustration
prompts.prompt: A flat, textured illustration of a stout man with a thick blue beard and small orange glasses, set against a **solid black background**. He is wearing a heavy **black puffer jacket** adorned with large **maroon and yellow leaf patterns**. He wears multiple thick gold chains and rings, making rock-on hand gestures. A stylized **maroon leaf crown** floats above his head. Grainy, risograph print aesthetic. A stylized, geometric illustration of a tall, solemn man with a white-speckled beard and a **maroon face**, set against a **dark black background**. He stands behind a large, textured white skull on a pole. The composition is framed by delicate **maroon and gold botanical stems**. The man wears a **black and maroon garment** with a grid pattern at the bottom. High-contrast, folk-art inspired style with heavy stipple texture. A dynamic illustration of a character with a top-knot bun balancing on a skateboard, set against a **deep black background**. The character wears a **maroon jacket with yellow floral patterns**, black cargo pants with yellow dashes, and red socks with black shoes. Stylized yellow "energy lines" radiate from the figure. The foreground features dark, silhouetted foliage. Flat vector style with a grainy, vintage paper texture. A profile-view illustration of a slender man with futuristic goggles riding a vintage motorcycle through tall, dark grass. The background is a **solid matte black**. He wears a bright **maroon jacket** with a large yellow sunburst graphic on the back. The plants in the foreground are a mix of dark navy and **maroon leaves**. Sharp, clean lines mixed with a soft sponge-paint texture.
prompts.description: A stylized, textured illustration prompt featuring high-contrast colors and a grainy risograph print aesthetic for character design.

prompts.title: Pixar Style Fashion Editorial
prompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic fashion editorial portrait of a {argument name="character style" default="3d cute pixar style stylish man"} with white frame glasses standing in a minimalist studio beside large vertical 3D white letters spelling "{argument name="brand name" default="ZarOon"}". he leans casually leaning back against the letters with a confident, relaxed pose. he wears a {argument name="clothing" default="ZarOon oversized t-shirt with printed in clean white typography on the chest, black cargo pants, and white sneakers with red accents"}. Fashionable glasses, calm confident expression, modern streetwear aesthetic. Ratio 4:5
prompts.description: An ultra-realistic Pixar-style portrait of a stylish man for a fashion editorial, including specific brand typography.

prompts.title: Procedural Whimsical Mono-Punk Floating Diorama Generator
prompts.prompt: WHIMSICAL MONO-PUNK FLOATING MINIATURE DIORAMA PROMPT (Automatic Background Optimization, Smart Micro-Detail System, Procedural Activity Layer, Natural Irregularity Layer, Atmospheric Depth Layer, Procedural Scene Generator, Procedural Prop Generator, Procedural Architecture Generator, Procedural Lighting & Atmosphere Generator, Procedural Character & Population Generator, Procedural Diorama Base Generator) VARIABLE GUIDE GLOBAL_COMPLEXITY = Possible values: 'low','medium','high','ultra'. Controls density of buildings, props, characters, and environmental detail. If blank choose randomly between 'medium' and 'high'. PUNK_STYLE = {argument name="punk style" default="Steampunk"} If PUNK_STYLE is empty, then one style is randomly selected from LIST_OF_PUNK_STYLES, otherwise what is in the PUNK_STYLE variable is chosen LIST_OF_PUNK_STYLES = Steampunk, Dieselpunk, Atompunk, Cyberpunk, Biopunk, Nanopunk, Solarpunk, Decopunk, Clockpunk, Coalpunk, Raypunk, Stonepunk, Sailpunk, Cassettepunk, Teslapunk, Mythpunk, Sandalpunk, Oceanpunk, Frostpunk, Junglepunk, Desertpunk, Gothicpunk, Ironpunk, Crystalpunk, Rustpunk, Vaporwavepunk, Neonpunk, Skypunk, Aquapunk, Arborpunk, Astropunk, QuantumPunk, Mechanopunk, Technopunk, Retrocomputingpunk, Cattlepunk, Hopepunk SUBSTYLE = If specified use exactly. If set to none disable. If blank infer logically from PUNK_STYLE. TECHNOLOGY_LEVEL = If specified use exactly. If set to none disable. If blank infer from PUNK_STYLE. ENVIRONMENT = If specified use exactly. If set to none disable. If blank infer logically from active layers. CULTURE = If specified use exactly. If set to none disable. If blank infer culturally appropriate framework. PROCEDURAL_SCENE_GENERATOR = 'on' PROCEDURAL_PROP_GENERATOR = 'on' PROCEDURAL_ARCHITECTURE_GENERATOR = 'on' PROCEDURAL_LIGHTING_ATMOSPHERE_GENERATOR = 'on' PROCEDURAL_CHARACTER_POPULATION_GENERATOR = 'on' PROCEDURAL_DIORAMA_BASE_GENERATOR = 'on' FOCAL_INTEREST_LAYER = off MATERIAL_COHESION_LAYER = 'on' VISUAL_CLARITY_OPTIMIZER = 'on' MICRO_LIFE_LAYER = 'on' COMPOSITION_ENGINE = 'on' EDGE_DEFINITION_LAYER = 'on' COLOR_HARMONY_LAYER = 'on' DIORAMA_CRAFTSMANSHIP_LAYER = 'on' PSG LAYER Implement only if PROCEDURAL_SCENE_GENERATOR='on'. Generate core scene structure using: LANDSCAPE_STRUCTURE (floating island, cliff terraces, canyon basin, harbor cove, forest clearing, mountain ridge, giant tree canopy, desert oasis, ice shelf, volcanic ridge) SETTLEMENT_TYPE (village, harbor town, trading port, monastery complex, research outpost, fortress town, sky dock, industrial district, hidden enclave) INFRASTRUCTURE_ELEMENTS (bridges, windmills, rail lines, cable lifts, aqueducts, airship docks, solar arrays, reactor towers, waterwheels) CIVILIAN_ACTIVITY (market trading, fishing, cargo loading, harvesting, machine repair, patrol movement, f
prompts.description: A highly complex, structured prompt template designed to procedurally generate whimsical, floating miniature dioramas in a specified punk style (defaulting to Steampunk), utilizing multiple procedural generation layers for scene, architecture, lighting, and population.

prompts.title: JSON Prompt Template for Text Rendering in AI Images
prompts.prompt: { "scene": "minimalist tech poster with gradient background", "text_elements": [ { "text": "AI Revolution 2025", "position": "center, upper third", "font_style": "bold, futuristic sans-serif, glowing effect", "size": "large headline" }, { "text": "The future is now", "position": "center, lower third", "font_style": "elegant script, smaller subtitle" } ] }
prompts.description: A JSON template and an example prompt demonstrating how to use the Nano Banana Pro's text rendering parameters. This allows users to specify the exact text, position, font style, and size for text elements within the generated image.
